# The First Truly Unified Sales Performance Management Solution
infinitySPM is the first Sales Performance Management solution that truly unifies CPM and SPM on a single platform – OneStream – trusted by over 1,600 global organizations.
[ request a demo ](https://calendly.com/d/ckxf-dw2-5qp/infinityspm-intro-meeting)
![](https://infinityspm.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/home-video-overlay-.webp)
## Unify Sales and Finance with infinitySPM on OneStream
Top-performing sales teams aren’t just well-compensated – they’re strategically aligned, data-driven, and continuously fine-tuned. With infinitySPM, you can unify planning, achieve revenue excellence, and optimize incentives to drive maximum impact, powered by our fully integrated Sales Performance Management solution.
## Unified Sales Planning
###  End-to-End Alignment 
Unify finance, sales, and operations to plan smarter, pay accurately, and execute confidently — all within your trusted OneStream platform.
###  Data-Rich Insights 
Enhance visibility and agility with a centralized platform for financial, operational, and sales data.
###  Simplify Cross-Functional Workflows 
Eliminate data silos and reduce manual handoffs.
![](https://infinityspm.com/)
## Revenue Excellence
###  Territory Optimization & Quota Setting 
Strategically align sellers to market opportunities and build strong revenue strategies, from optimized territories to accurately aligned quotas.
###  Account Segmentation & Scoring 
Prioritize high-value accounts and adjust strategies in real-time.
###  Performance Accountability 
Drive transparency and ownership by comparing forecasts to actuals with clear visibility into top and bottom performer.
![](https://infinityspm.com/)
## Optimized Incentives
###  Automate Commission Calculations 
Enhance commission accuracy with automated, rules-based processing for accruals and actuals, fully integrated into your financial close process.
###  Flexible Compensation Design 
Align your teams with business objectives and quickly adapt to evolving market conditions with flexible, date-effective incentive plans.
###  Performance Visibility 
Empower sales teams with timely, mobile access to earnings details and performance metrics through drillable incentive statements and interactive dashboards.
![](https://infinityspm.com/)

##  Playbooks™
## The Enterprise Sales Engagement Platform
## Create meaningful conversations with prospects and customers to accelerate revenue results.
[ Request a demo ](https://www.insidesales.com/demo/)
[ Tour Product ](https://www.insidesales.com/playbooks/)
![Verizon, Sage, DellEMG, Fidelity, NetApp, and VMware use the Playbooks Sales Platform](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/img_HP-logobar2.png)
![Buyer Hints help you gain visibility, determine the best strategy and get insight into leads](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/img-PBscreen.png)
###  Get more of the right things done.
Playbooks goes beyond a traditional sales auto dialer or sequencer. It doesn’t just help your team do more, it helps them do more of the right things. Reps are provided with additional contacts and recommendations of who, when, and how to reach out—making their efforts more effective. Leadership is provided with valuable insight into their remote sales team to see what’s working and what isn’t. 
[ Learn More ](https://www.insidesales.com/playbooks/)
“The user interface is very friendly. In addition to that, the InsideSales platform has many industry-leading features to ensure you are successful in your customer outreach. Their neuralytics is the best I've seen and can help you identify the best day and time to send emails, or place phone calls for maximum response rates.”
![](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/g2circle.svg)  
**G2 Review**
“Being presented with the right opportunity at the right time...allows me to manage my time on activities that will generate revenue.”

**G2 Review**

![The three principles of XANT are Productivity, Visibility, and Prioritization](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/img_3Principles-wheel.png)
###  3 Principles to accelerate revenue
Playbooks accelerates a sales team’s impact on revenue by improving their productivity, visibility, and prioritization. Reps get prioritized recommendations to know who to engage, how to engage them, and how to stay organized to focus on activities that have the most impact on the bottom line.
![iconBlue-productive](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/iconBlue-productive.svg)
###  Productivity
Reps don’t have to waste time on data entry, administration work, or other time-suckers. With Playbooks, they can focus on selling—leading to quicker responses, more engagement, and the ability to work more leads in less time.
[Read More >](https://www.insidesales.com/cadence/)
![iconBlue-priority](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/iconBlue-priority.svg)
###  Prioritization
Get more of the _right_ things done. Increasing untargeted outreach won’t benefit anyone. Playbooks identifies, prioritizes, and recommends the right accounts to contact and how to engage with them, setting up your reps for success. 
[Read More >](https://www.insidesales.com/prioritization/)
![iconBlue-vis](https://www.insidesales.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/iconBlue-vis.svg)
###  Visibility
Gain in-depth insights into individual and team performance. See what’s working and who’s contributing. This visibility allows you to make data-backed decisions in regard to mentoring, strategy, resource allocation, budget spend, and more.
[Read More >](https://www.insidesales.com/reporting/)

###  Data + AI
Data is the key to delivering revenue impact in modern sales. Playbooks empowers users with a unique data advantage that goes beyond AI or a reliable CRM integration.
Playbooks provides actionable insights from **27 billion revenue interactions and 183 million buyer profiles** to your sales team and enriches customer CRM with buyer intelligence data. This data identifies who to target, how they behave, and how reps should engage with them.

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.
The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... Show more
NecessaryAlways Active
Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.
  * Cookie
__cf_bm
  * Duration
1 hour
  * Description
This cookie, set by Cloudflare, is used to support Cloudflare Bot Management. 


  * Cookie
__hssrc
  * Duration
session
  * Description
This cookie is set by Hubspot whenever it changes the session cookie. The __hssrc cookie set to 1 indicates that the user has restarted the browser, and if the cookie does not exist, it is assumed to be a new session.


  * Cookie
__hssc
  * Duration
1 hour
  * Description
HubSpot sets this cookie to keep track of sessions and to determine if HubSpot should increment the session number and timestamps in the __hstc cookie.


  * Cookie
JSESSIONID
  * Duration
session
  * Description
New Relic uses this cookie to store a session identifier so that New Relic can monitor session counts for an application.


  * Cookie
wpEmojiSettingsSupports
  * Duration
session
  * Description
WordPress sets this cookie when a user interacts with emojis on a WordPress site. It helps determine if the user's browser can display emojis properly.


  * Cookie
_GRECAPTCHA
  * Duration
6 months
  * Description
Google Recaptcha service sets this cookie to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.


  * Cookie
rc::a
  * Duration
never
  * Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.


  * Cookie
rc::f
  * Duration
never
  * Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.


  * Cookie
rc::c
  * Duration
session
  * Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.


  * Cookie
rc::b
  * Duration
session
  * Description
This cookie is set by the Google recaptcha service to identify bots to protect the website against malicious spam attacks.


  * Cookie
__cfruid
  * Duration
session
  * Description
Cloudflare sets this cookie to identify trusted web traffic.


Functional
Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.
  * Cookie
messagesUtk
  * Duration
6 months
  * Description
HubSpot sets this cookie to recognize visitors who chat via the chatflows tool.


  * Cookie
__session
  * Duration
1 year 1 month 4 days
  * Description
GitBook sets this cookie for logging in.


Analytics
Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.
  * Cookie
CLID
  * Duration
1 year
  * Description
Microsoft Clarity set this cookie to store information about how visitors interact with the website. The cookie helps to provide an analysis report. The data collection includes the number of visitors, where they visit the website, and the pages visited.


  * Cookie
_ga_*
  * Duration
1 year 1 month 4 days
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views.


  * Cookie
_ga
  * Duration
1 year 1 month 4 days
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.


  * Cookie
cb_group_id
  * Duration
1 year
  * Description
Clearbit sets this cookie to track page views and traits for Clearbit.


  * Cookie
cb_anonymous_id
  * Duration
1 year
  * Description
Clearbit sets this cookie to track page views and traits for Clearbit.


  * Cookie
_clck
  * Duration
1 year
  * Description
Microsoft Clarity sets this cookie to retain the browser's Clarity User ID and settings exclusive to that website. This guarantees that actions taken during subsequent visits to the same website will be linked to the same user ID.


  * Cookie
_clsk
  * Duration
1 day
  * Description
Microsoft Clarity sets this cookie to store and consolidate a user's pageviews into a single session recording.


  * Cookie
__hstc
  * Duration
6 months
  * Description
Hubspot set this main cookie for tracking visitors. It contains the domain, initial timestamp (first visit), last timestamp (last visit), current timestamp (this visit), and session number (increments for each subsequent session).


  * Cookie
hubspotutk
  * Duration
6 months
  * Description
HubSpot sets this cookie to keep track of the visitors to the website. This cookie is passed to HubSpot on form submission and used when deduplicating contacts.


  * Cookie
SM
  * Duration
session
  * Description
Microsoft Clarity cookie set this cookie for synchronizing the MUID across Microsoft domains.


  * Cookie
MR
  * Duration
7 days
  * Description
This cookie, set by Bing, is used to collect user information for analytics purposes.


Performance
Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.
  * Cookie
__utma
  * Duration
1 year 1 month 4 days
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to distinguish users and sessions. The cookie is created when the JavaScript library executes and there are no existing __utma cookies. The cookie is updated every time data is sent to Google Analytics.


  * Cookie
__utmc
  * Duration
session
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to enable interoperability with urchin.js, an older version of Google Analytics and is used in conjunction with the __utmb cookie to determine new sessions/visits. It is deleted when the user closes the browser.


  * Cookie
__utmz
  * Duration
6 months
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to store the traffic source or campaign by which the visitor reached the site.


  * Cookie
__utmt
  * Duration
10 minutes
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to inhibit the request rate.


  * Cookie
__utmb
  * Duration
1 hour
  * Description
Google Analytics sets this cookie to determine new sessions/visits. __utmb cookie is created when the JavaScript library executes and there are no existing __utma cookies. It is updated every time data is sent to Google Analytics.


  * Cookie
SRM_B
  * Duration
1 year 24 days
  * Description
Used by Microsoft Advertising as a unique ID for visitors.


Advertisement
Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.
  * Cookie
cb_user_id
  * Duration
1 year
  * Description
Clearbit sets this cookie to collect data on visitors. This information is used to assign visitors into segments, making website advertising more relevant.


  * Cookie
MUID
  * Duration
1 year 24 days
  * Description
Bing sets this cookie to recognise unique web browsers visiting Microsoft sites. This cookie is used for advertising, site analytics, and other operations.


  * Cookie
ANONCHK
  * Duration
10 minutes
  * Description
The ANONCHK cookie, set by Bing, is used to store a user's session ID and verify ads' clicks on the Bing search engine. The cookie helps in reporting and personalization as well.


Uncategorized
Other uncategorized cookies are those that are being analyzed and have not been classified into a category as yet.
  * Cookie
_cfuvid
  * Duration
session
  * Description
Description is currently not available.

debug
  * Duration
never
  * Description

1 year
  * Description

  * Duration

  * Description

#### What do our Customers say?
”I personally check Intellizence nearly every day and am amazed by how often I find things that are relevant for our business such as customer M&A or new executive announcements that can lead to risks, new opportunities or even just an occasion to deepen our relationship.”- Nick Mehta, CEO, Gainsight
”Intellizence make conversion of information to intelligence easy, freeing up time for better analysis and bespoke insights. The ability to create signals is a huge differentiator.”- Zena Applebaum, Senior Director, Thomson Reuters Canada & Fellow of Council of Competitive Intelligence Fellows
”The team at Intellizence has been outstanding to work with. They are extremely responsive, continually seeking feedback and input and making enhancements to their solution. The solution is exceptionally valuable to our organization we are excited to expand the opportunities to leverage tool further throughout our companies.”- FairVentures ( Fairfax Financial)
”Intellizence helps me to stay updated about my clients on a daily basis. Intellizence delivers focused signals that are relevant for my business development activities and effective client engagement.”- Kristine M. Di Bacco, Partner, Fenwick & West LLP
“Through Intellizence's AI systems, we were able to gather additional data about ventilators, personal protective equipment and other COVID-19 critical supply chains. With their help, Communitech has been able to more easily and effectively monitor real-time economic insights for the tech community, while also finding ways for entrepreneurs to support local health care needs.”- Mauro Rossi, PhD PEng Director, Advanced Technology Platforms Communitech

# Integrate outbound with HubSpot and Salesforce
We route outbound campaign data to your CRM. See activities, go omnichannel, attribute revenue, start or stop outreach, and more.
**Integrate with: Instantly, Smartlead, EmailBison, HeyReach, Clay**
[ GET A DEMO ](https://outboundsync.com/demo) [ SEE INTEGRATIONS ](https://outboundsync.com/#integrations)
![OutboundSync_HubSpot-App_Salesforce-App_Homepage_Hero](https://outboundsync.com/hubfs/OutboundSync_HubSpot-App_Salesforce-App_Homepage_Hero.webp)
USED BY LEADING REVENUE TEAMS

WHY TEAMS CHOOSE OUTBOUNDSYNC 
## Integrated campaigns close more deals
![icon-revenue](https://outboundsync.com/hubfs/icon-revenue.png)
#### Track revenue
Attribute revenue based on your deals. Use lists and reports to understand where outbound is working (or not). 
![icon-email](https://outboundsync.com/hubfs/icon-email.png)
#### Sync activities
Log your outbound email activity, including sent, replies, opens, clicks, unsubscribes, bounces, and reply categories.
![icon-phone](https://outboundsync.com/hubfs/icon-phone.png)
#### Go omnichannel
Use automation to tap multiple channels, like phones. Use the best tool for each job and grow your pipeline.
![icon-block](https://outboundsync.com/hubfs/icon-block.png)
#### Block sending
Use OutboundSync as your block list. Source from your CRM and prevent outreach to key contacts and companies.
RIDING THE ORANGE WAVE? 
## HubSpot CRM integration
OutboundSync brings your modern outbound efforts into HubSpot. You can create and update companies and contacts, log activities, create timeline events, trigger workflows, build reports, and more.
[ SEE HUBSPOT INTEGRATION ](https://outboundsync.com/hubspot)
![outboundsync-contact-record-overview](https://outboundsync.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Imported%20sitepage%20images/outboundsync-contact-record-overview.png?width=2000&height=1173&name=outboundsync-contact-record-overview.png)
READY TO GO BLUE? 
## Salesforce CRM integration
OutboundSync brings your modern outbound efforts into Salesforce. You can create and update accounts and contacts, log activities, trigger flows, build reports, and more.
[ SEE SALESFORCE INTEGRATION ](https://outboundsync.com/salesforce)
![smartlead-salesforce-integration-outboundsync-contactrecord](https://outboundsync.com/hs-fs/hubfs/smartlead-salesforce-integration-outboundsync-contactrecord.png?width=2000&height=1219&name=smartlead-salesforce-integration-outboundsync-contactrecord.png)

This website uses cookies
We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services. 
Consent Selection
**Necessary**
**Preferences**
**Statistics**
**Marketing**
[Show details](https://jabmo.com/)
Details
  * Necessary  4
Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
    * [Cookiebot1](https://jabmo.com/)[Learn more about this provider![opens in a new window](https://jabmo.com/)](https://www.cookiebot.com/goto/privacy-policy/ "Cookiebot's privacy policy")
**CookieConsent** Stores the user's cookie consent state for the current domain
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 1 year**Type** : HTTP Cookie
    * [analytics.accountinsight.cloud1](https://jabmo.com/)
**_pk_testcookie_domain** This cookie determines whether the browser accepts cookies.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 1 day**Type** : HTTP Cookie
    * [g2.com2](https://jabmo.com/)
**__cf_bm** This cookie is used to distinguish between humans and bots. This is beneficial for the website, in order to make valid reports on the use of their website.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 1 day**Type** : HTTP Cookie
**datadome** Used in context with the website's BotManager. The BotManager detects, categorizes and compiles reports on potential bots trying to access the website.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : Session**Type** : HTTP Cookie
  * Preferences  0
Preference cookies enable a website to remember information that changes the way the website behaves or looks, like your preferred language or the region that you are in.
We do not use cookies of this type.
  * Statistics  2
Statistic cookies help website owners to understand how visitors interact with websites by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
    * [analytics.accountinsight.cloud2](https://jabmo.com/)
**_pk_id#** Collects statistics on the user's visits to the website, such as the number of visits, average time spent on the website and what pages have been read.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 1 year**Type** : HTTP Cookie
**_pk_ses#** Used by Piwik Analytics Platform to track page requests from the visitor during the session.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 1 day**Type** : HTTP Cookie
  * Marketing  2
Marketing cookies are used to track visitors across websites. The intention is to display ads that are relevant and engaging for the individual user and thereby more valuable for publishers and third party advertisers.
    * [Google2](https://jabmo.com/)[Learn more about this provider![opens in a new window](https://jabmo.com/)](https://business.safety.google/privacy/ "Google's privacy policy")
Some of the data collected by this provider is for the purposes of personalization and measuring advertising effectiveness.
**_ga** Used to send data to Google Analytics about the visitor's device and behavior. Tracks the visitor across devices and marketing channels.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 2 years**Type** : HTTP Cookie
**_ga_#** Used to send data to Google Analytics about the visitor's device and behavior. Tracks the visitor across devices and marketing channels.
**Maximum Storage Duration** : 2 years**Type** : HTTP Cookie
  * Unclassified 0
Unclassified cookies are cookies that we are in the process of classifying, together with the providers of individual cookies.
We do not use cookies of this type.

# Boost your revenue with Jabmo ABM. The most comprehensive solution for Account-Based Marketing.
The Expandi Jabmo ABM platform is a game-changer for your marketing and sales teams.
Find and engage with ready to buy accounts using superior insights, personalised messages and an easy to use omni-channel marketing platform.
Book a Demo
![Award Frost](https://jabmo.com/img/F&S_banner_08.jpg)
# Why Jabmo ABM?
![Global Approach](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-global-approach.png)
#### Global Approach
Identify, target and maximise the audience reach with the only non-US centric ABM platform that includes and tracks country specific IP addresses not only company Head Quarters IP addresses and multi-language intent.
![Buyer Intent](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-buyer-intent.png)
#### Buyer Intent
Identify your ideal accounts’ position in the buying journey, prioritise them and customise messages thanks to the integration with the only multi-language and local channel buyer intent platform.
![ABA](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-aba.png)
#### ABA
Reach the entire buying committee with zero waste ads and personalised messages thanks to the integration with our award-winning Account-based Advertising (ABA) platform.
![Website personalization](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-web-personalization.png)
#### Website personalization
Personalise messages and website experiences means an increase on site visit time, higher engagement with prospects, targeted CTAs that will lead to an increase in conversion.
![Lookalike audiences](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-lookalike-audiences.png)
#### Lookalike audiences
Gain visibility on unknown prospects. Tap into new accounts, extend your market reach with the Lookalike prospecting tool. Thanks to the multiple filtering options you can carve the audience that is right for you.
![Consolidated Reporting](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-consolidated-reporting.png)
#### Consolidated Reporting
Gain visibility and maximise campaign performance with a consolidated omni-channel marketing reporting view. Integration with the most important third-party tools such as emailing, aba, social, telemarketing, etc.
## Power the Success of your Marketing and Sales teams
![icon drive awareness](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-drive-awareness.png)
#### Drive awareness and engagement with key accounts.
Accelerate sales of strategic products and solutions with your most valuable accounts. Run hyper-targeted campaigns using highly personalised messages.
![icon identify and prioritise](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-identify-and-prioritise.png)
#### Identify and Prioritize accounts ready to buy.
Identify, select, and prioritize accounts ready to buy. Use the best multi-language buying intent signals and the Lookalike audience tool to craft your strategy so you won’t miss any hot opportunities.
![icon cookieless](https://jabmo.com/img/icon-cookieless.png)
#### Make your sales team close deals faster.
Help your sales reps prioritize sales engagement with highly qualifies leads and superior account intelligence. Monitor customer engagement and competitive threats.

# Sustainable logistics solutions to accelerate your growth anywhere in the world.
## Our ambition
Be the partner and employer of reference in our sector
Our ambition is clear: to be the partner of reference for our customers and the employer of reference for our talents, by providing sustainable and dedicated logistics solutions that can be deployed anywhere in the world.
[ Discover our key figures ](https://www.id-logistics.com/us/group/key-figures/)
![](https://www.id-logistics.com/media/2023/02/home-notre-ambition.jpg)
## Innovation
Anticipating your future needs
Our 42,000 employees devise innovative solutions every day to improve your performance, today and tomorrow. These initiatives step up the pace of operational or breakthrough innovations, digitization as well as automation, and robotization wherever these improve customer service, employee ergonomics and safety.
[ DISCOVER OUR INNOVATIONS ](https://www.id-logistics.com/us/innovation-csr/innovation-in-practice/)

## Solutions
Supporting you throughout the supply chain
Our experts in contract logistics and transportation develop sustainable solutions adapted to each of your projects thanks to our global service offering: warehousing and value-added services, supply chain optimization, turnkey project delivery, and dedicated e-commerce solutions.

## CSR
Fully committed to sustainable logistics
Our Group has set itself ambitious social, environmental and societal goals designed to meet the UN Sustainable Development Goals. We have therefore implemented a responsible approach involving all stakeholders in our ecosystem, from our customers to our employees, our suppliers and our partners.
[ DISCOVER OUR CSR INITIATIVE ](https://www.id-logistics.com/us/innovation-csr/csr-initiative/)
![](https://www.id-logistics.com/media/2023/02/Home-RSE.jpg)
## Join ID Logistics
Welcome to a caring and committed company
Join us and together we can take on the challenges of the logistics of the future, in a working environment defined by quality and teamwork.  
Join an international team driven by community and a winning spirit. Contribute to the growth of a Group offering fantastic opportunities for development, throughout your professional life.

## Janek Works. Here’s How.
We leverage decades of research and experience to help clients measurably improve sales. Our methodology is anchored by four basic principles.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### A wide-angle view that yields precision solutions.
We start with a holistic approach, asking the right questions to understand your sales challenges from every angle. Then we implement solutions that solve root-cause issues.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### These aren’t just ideas. They’re facts.
Our methods work because they’re based on a continuously updated body of research that’s been battle-tested in the field. This isn’t another sales philosophy — it’s science.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### In sales, one size never fits all.
We tailor our solutions to the needs of each client, adapting to differences in business, culture, and language. With Janek, change is embraced because it is done with you, not to you.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### Lasting change requires follow-through.
The true measure of a sales performance training program is next year’s results. We follow through with technology tools and coaching services to ensure effective behavioral changes endure long after training ends.
[Why should you use Janek?](https://www.janek.com/who-we-are/)

## Featured Sales Training Program
![stevie award badge](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### **Selling Virtually™**
Purpose-built to enable a robust virtual selling capability that boosts productivity, increases revenue and profitability, and strengthens customer relationships. 
It equips sales professionals with the skills to effectively build their brand, prospect, and sell to clients in a virtual environment.
Selling Virtually™ is fully customizable to your industry and can be delivered in conjunction with our award-winning training sustainment and coaching options to drive immediate and long-term results. 
[Learn More](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/selling-virtually/)
## Featured Sales Training Program
![Critical Negotiation™ Skills](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
###  **Critical Negotiation™** Skills
Most business transactions require negotiation, and buyers are constantly looking for the highest value and the most concessions.
Janek’s Critical Negotiation™ Skills programs is a research-based sales training workshop that prepares sellers to engage clients with a win-win mindset that results in mutually beneficial outcomes.
Critical Negotiation™ Skills can be delivered in person or online, is fully customizable to your vertical and needs, and be optionally combined with any of Janek’s acclaimed knowledge retention programs.
[Learn More](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/critical-sales-negotiations/)
## Featured Sales Training Program
![Gold 2021 Stevie Winner](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
###  **Critical Selling®** Skills
Janek’s flagship training program and winner of Best Sales Training Program of the Year by the Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service provides sales professionals with the skills and strategies to stimulate interest, build trust, create value in their offerings, close with confidence, and dramatically improve their overall sales effectiveness with prospects and customers.
As with all of Janek’s training programs, Critical Selling® Skills can be optionally customized and delivered in person, online, blended learning, or via Train-the-Trainer. It can also be combined with all of Janek’s sustainment and coaching options for long-term behavior change.
[Learn More](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/critical-selling-skills/)

## Our Sales Performance Training and Coaching Services
Strengthen your sales force with Janek by your side. We’re passionate about advising clients in planning, developing, implementing and maintaining premium performance solutions that meaningfully impact their operations. This mission is propelled through our vast service offerings, allowing our cutting-edge team of professionals to address a wide range of company needs. Our library of sales performance training programs is thoughtfully developed using the industry’s latest research, and we can adapt its scope to meet your sector, culture and language requirements.
We’re proud to deliver our training services in various ways, including [On-site](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/instructor-led-sales-training/), [Virtually](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/virtual-instructor-led-sales-training/) and [Blended](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/janek-ondemand/) or through [Train-the-Trainer](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/train-the-trainer/) channels. Our detailed ATLAS training approach guides our work as we provide organizations with the following services: 
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### Sales Training
Equip your sales team with the [practical information and skills](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-training/) needed to succeed in an ever-changing sales landscape. 
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%200%200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### Sales Consulting
Leverage our proven [Sales Performance Blueprint model](https://www.janek.com/services/sales-consulting/) to obtain effective recommendations and generate long-term success.

## The Ultimate Guide to Developing a High-Performance Sales Organization
As a sports car is the integration of several diverse systems working seamlessly together, a high-performing sales organization is similarly complex. From the processes to products, to customers and sales reps, to assessment and technology, high performance is never an accident.
While drivers need not understand the systems to feel the thrill, sales leaders must update, refine, and re-engineer to maintain peak performance. From our experience and research into how top-performing sales teams work, we have assembled this white paper to share the foundational pillars of success.

## About Our Company JANTEK
JANTEK ELECTRONICS, INC. is an established manufacturer of Workforce Management / Time and Attendance, and security access systems with the corporate office located in Temple City, California. Since 1986, we have provided time and attendance and shop floor control systems, access control systems and security related products to private industries and government institutions. We have also produced OEM and white-labeled our licensed products for major corporations.
[ Jantek Electronics ](https://jantek.com/about-us/)

## Jupiter Time & Attendance System
A Powered Business Resource for Companies of All Sizes, as Simple as 1-2-3. 
## 1. Choose your base software platform
Our entry-level Small Business Edition software is great for companies with less than 100 employees. If you need more flexibility and features, go for our Standard Version. For large businesses with thousands of employees or multiple locations, the Client/Server Version is an excellent choice. For a full online solution, try our Web Time. 
## 2. Select data collection option(s)*
A wide variety of data collection and time clock terminals are available, including card readers and biometric devices that focus on security and accuracy. In addition, we offer “virtual” punch options that require no additional hardware. View the Data Collection Options now. 
_* For the Small Business Edition, skip to the next step._
Consult a biometric compliance expert and your labor attorney about getting your employees’ written consent when using biometric time clocks. 
## 3. Add a payroll interface and any optional modules
With over 200 Payroll Interfaces to choose from, you are bound to find the payroll service your company uses. In addition, we have a large selection of Add-on Modules that make the powerful and easy-to-use Jupiter family of products even more versatile.
With your desired choices in hand, contact Us for a quotation or to get more information on any of our products.

## Return on Investment (ROI)
Many companies only consider the potential cost savings from the elimination of manual calculations, when their total return on investment is generated from three different areas: reducing processing time, eliminating human errors in calculation, and preventing time theft. Your largest savings may come from hidden costs that may not have been considered. By targeting only the savings possible by eliminating manual calculations, a small company of only 10 employees would most likely elect not to purchase. This decision would cost the company thousands of dollars annually! 
[ More Information ](https://jantek.com/)

### About Jargon.AI
![Share](https://img.atom.com/public/images/new_landing/share.svg) Share 
Jargon.AI – A Premium Domain for Language Intelligence, Communication Tools, and Industry-Specific AI Solutions Jargon.AI is a sharp, memorable, and highly brandable domain designed for ventures operating at the intersection of language, communication, and artificial intelligence. The word “Jargon” evokes specialized language—whether in law, medicine, technology, gaming, finance, or other industries—while the .AI extension adds a layer of innovation, making this domain an ideal fit for tools that interpret, simplify, or generate domain-specific content. Whether you’re developing an AI-powered translator for complex terminology, a smart writing assistant for technical fields, or an enterprise solution that tailors messaging to niche audiences, Jargon.AI positions your brand as the authority in intelligent language solutions. KEY ADVANTAGES Category-Defining Clarity: The domain name clearly suggests a focus on decoding, generating, or working with complex or industry-specific language using AI—a powerful niche in the growing world of language technology. Built for Innovation: The .AI extension signals advanced technology and positions your brand at the forefront of the language AI revolution, whether you're in NLP, enterprise software, or educational tools. Brandable and Flexible: Jargon.AI is broad enough to support multiple use cases while remaining unique and tightly focused. It’s ideal for startups, product launches, or sub-brands targeting specialized communication. Memorable and Distinct: With only seven characters and a strong single-word identity, the domain is easy to remember, spell, and pronounce—important traits for brand recognition and word-of-mouth growth. Strong Intellectual Positioning: The name projects thought leadership in the AI communication space—appealing to professionals, researchers, and enterprises looking for trusted, high-tech solutions. Exact Match Appeal: “Jargon” is a common and easily understood term across industries, and pairing it with .AI creates a direct and authoritative name for anything related to AI-driven language processing. Valuable Digital Asset: Premium one-word domains with strong relevance to emerging technologies are highly sought after for branding, fundraising, and resale potential. WHO CAN BENEFIT? Natural Language Processing (NLP) Startups: Ideal for ventures working on jargon simplification, semantic search, document summarization, or contextual translation powered by AI. Technical Writing Platforms: A powerful brand for tools that help users write, understand, or reframe technical or field-specific language for broader audiences. Healthcare and Legal Tech Firms: Companies that specialize in decoding complex terminology for patients or clients can use Jargon.AI to establish trust and clarity in sensitive sectors. Educational Technology (EdTech): An excellent domain for apps that help students, professionals, or non-native speakers understand and master specialized vocabulary. Gaming & Developer Communities: Jargon.AI could serve as a brand for platforms that bridge communication between developers and users, translating technical speak into clear, actionable insight. AI Content Tools: A smart fit for AI copywriting tools that adapt messaging based on industry language or reframe jargon-heavy content into accessible formats. Enterprise Knowledge Systems: Companies offering AI-based knowledge management, training, or onboarding tools can use Jargon.AI as a brand for simplifying internal communications. VCs and Brand Builders: A premium digital asset for investors or entrepreneurs looking to develop a standout name in the fast-growing AI + language space. SIMPLIFY THE COMPLEX WITH JARGON.AI Jargon.AI is more than just a domain—it’s a brand that speaks the language of innovation, clarity, and intelligent communication. Whether you're building AI-powered tools for professionals or bridging gaps between experts and their audiences, Jargon.AI provides a distinctive and high-impact foundation to launch and grow your vision. Secure it today and bring smarter language to the world.

### Frequently   
Asked Questions
Visit our [Help Center](https://helpdesk.atom.com) for more information
How does Jargon.AI get transferred to me? 
Once you complete the payment for Jargon.AI or any other domain, you will have access to our Domain Transfer Center where you can initiate the Domain Transfer. Our Domain Transfer Specialists will assist you with transferring the domain to the registrar of your choice. Typically most transfers are initiated within 24 hours of domain purchase. Learn more about our [Domain Transfer Process](https://helpdesk.atom.com/en/articles/3336020-how-does-the-domain-transfer-process-work)
Does Jargon.AI come with Trademark or Business Registration? 
Jargon.AI and other names on Atom Marketplace do not include Trademarks or business registration. This is because Trademarks are unique to the industry (class) as well as country of the business. Since Jargon.AI can be purchased by anyone for any use, it would not be possible for us to file a Trademark in advance. 
We recommend that you do some research and/or seek legal advice to ensure that the name you are interested in does not have a direct Trademark conflict by a competitor in your industry and within your region. If there is no direct conflict, or the existing trademark is unrelated to how you plan to use it, then you have a good chance of being able to trademark the name yourself. If there is an existing trademark, keep in mind that, as long as your business is in a different industry, you may still be able to file a trademark for the name. 
We also offer a Trademark validation & Filing service which includes upfront Trademark validation and filing the Trademark application on your behalf by a licensed Trademark Attorney. 
What is your refund policy? 
If for some reason you do not wish to move forward with the purchase of Jargon.AI, you are entitled to a refund as long as following conditions are met:
  * The domain was purchased via outright payment (not installments)
  * You contact us within 24 hours of purchase to request a refund.
  * You have not yet initiated or requested the transfer from your Transfer Center.


Note: The refund may be subject to cancellation fees. See our [Terms of Domain Purchase](https://helpdesk.atom.com/en/articles/2131996-domain-marketplace-terms-conditions-for-buyers)
Are there any ongoing costs after I purchase the Domain? 
In order to purchase the domain, you only pay a one-time cost. However, once the domain is transferred to you, you will need to renew it on a yearly basis with your Domain registrar. The yearly renewal fees are paid directly to the domain registrar and are typically about $10 USD per year for .com domains. The renewal fees may be different for other domain extensions such as .io, .xyz etc. 
How safe is the purchase process? 
All domain purchases are backed by our Purchase Protection Guarantee. With over 50,000 customers worldwide, Atom.com has been featured in the Inc 5000 list of fastest growing companies for 3 consecutive years. 
We initiate most domain transfers within 1 Business day of purchase. If, for any reason, we are unable to transfer the domain to your ownership, we offer a 100% refund. 
How do payment plans work? 
Several of our domains offer payment plans, which allows you to make smaller monthly payments to purchase the domain. This is a great option if you are looking to minimize your upfront costs. 
The domain will stay with Atom until you have completed all payments. However you can begin using the domain immediately after your first payment. Our team will assist you with any changes to the Domain settings. Once the domain has been fully paid off, we will transfer the domain to your ownership. 
You also have the option to cancel the payment plan at any time. Learn more about [How Payment Plans Work.](https://helpdesk.atom.com/en/articles/6409018-buying-a-domain-on-a-payment-plan)
#### Atom.com Purchase Protection Program 
![Shop With Peace Of Mind](https://img.atom.com/public/images/minimal_landing/tick.svg)
**Shop With Peace Of Mind** We offer a full refund if a domain can't be transferred to your ownership. This doesn't happen very often, but when it does we're here to help! 
![How Atom.com Purchase Protection Works](https://img.atom.com/public/images/minimal_landing/info.svg)
**How Atom.com Purchase Protection Works** In the rare instance that a domain cannot be transferred to you, we'll refund the purchase price in full. This applies no matter what the transfer issue is.

###  #63 Smartex 
AI eliminating textile waste Read time: 5 minutes Hi, I’m Javi Gascón. This is Climate Tech Distillery, a newsletter…

##  Projects 
  * ###  [ Climate Tech Newsletter ](https://landing.climatetechdistillery.com?trk=public_profile_project-title "Climate Tech Newsletter")
####  Mar 2022 
After doing an intensive course on digital writing, I started writing daily about climate tech on LinkedIn. 1M+ impressions and 170 posts later I launched the Climate Tech Distillery newsletter. These are just the first steps of my goal to have a life around fixing climate change by learning, teaching, writing, investing, building climate tech. 
[ See project  ](https://landing.climatetechdistillery.com?trk=public_profile_project-button "Climate Tech Newsletter")
  * ###  [ JG Viajes ](https://www.jgviajes.com/?trk=public_profile_project-title "JG Viajes")
####  Jun 2019 - Mar 2020
Created a travel blog to make the most of my travel experience and passion. Content creation, design and monetization, all done to provide the best travel tips. Created and managed the blog through Wordpress and implemented Adsense and Google Analytics for analysis and monetization. 
[ See project  ](https://www.jgviajes.com/?trk=public_profile_project-button "JG Viajes")

  * [ Khizer Abbas  Superhuman AI • 129K followers ](https://pk.linkedin.com/in/khizer-abbas?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ BOOM! You don’t need expensive analyst subscriptions anymore. You can now generate full industry reports using any LLM, ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Qwen3 and public data. Here are the areas that this prompt covers: 1. Structured industry forecasts 2. Competitive landscape mapping (e.g., Magic Quadrants) 3. Strategic insights for enterprise buyers 4. Vendor comparisons with pros/cons 5. Trend analysis backed by years of data Here's the mega prompt that turn any LLM in to Gartner: "You are a world-class industry analyst with expertise in market research, competitive intelligence, and strategic forecasting. Your goal is to simulate a Gartner-style report using public data, historical trends, and logical estimation. For each request: • Generate clear, structured insights based on known market signals. • Build data-backed forecasts using assumptions (state them). • Identify top vendors and categorize them by niche, scale, or innovation. • Highlight risks, emerging players, and future trends. Be analytical, not vague. Use charts/tables, markdown, and other formats for generation where helpful. Be explicit about what’s estimated vs known. Use this structure: 1. Market Overview 2. Key Players 3. Forecast (1–3 years) 4. Opportunities & Risks 5. Strategic Insights" I tested this on 3 real-world topics: • AI note-taking apps • LLM ops platforms • Wearable health tech Each LLM produced a full 5-part breakdown with vendor maps, projections, and risks in 30 seconds. Here’s what came out: ChatGPT: - Nailed the strategic insights. - Good structure, clear reasoning. - Weak on emerging startups. Claude: - Great at risk analysis + trend spotting. - Slightly generic vendor section. Gemini: Overall good output Tip: Use Deepsearch Most people ask LLMs to “summarize an industry.” That gets you fluff. But assign the role of an analyst, define the structure, and set expectations? Gartner charges thousands per year. This costs you nothing but a good prompt and a few smart follow-up questions. You get Gartner-level clarity for free. But conversions? Still flat. The truth: most teams don’t struggle with ideas but with where to start optimizing the funnel. Here’s how top CRO experts approach it. 1. Start where the data points you. Brian Massey, Conversion Scientist at Conversion Sciences, says the data always decides. If users drop off on category pages, start there. If add-to-cart rates are low, focus on product pages. Pro tip: Use GA4 or FigPii to see exactly where people stop and fix that first. 2. Prioritize by effort and ROI. Iqbal Ali, experimentation consultant, recommends scoring each idea before testing. > Small fixes like clarifying pricing or simplifying forms often deliver faster ROI than a full-page redesign. > Use frameworks like ICE (Impact, Confidence, Effort) to choose your first experiment. 3. Optimize both ends of the funnel. Abi Hough, CRO consultant, warns that working in sequence is a trap. > Fix checkout friction while also ensuring ads and landing pages align with user intent. > When both ends improve together, you stop leaking conversions at every step. 4. Begin at the bottom for faster wins. Spencer G., Senior CRO Specialist, often starts from the bottom up. If traffic isn’t an issue, fix the checkout and cart flow first. That’s where small tweaks drive the biggest gains. The pattern is clear: >Let data tell you where users struggle. >Fix the highest-impact problems first. > Keep refining both acquisition and conversion sides. 📊 Read the full guide with examples and expert commentary in the comments section. #CRO #ConversionOptimization #DigitalMarketing #ABTesting #FunnelOptimization #Invesp  `` `` 10  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 3 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/invesp_cro-conversionoptimization-digitalmarketing-activity-7388526168053960704-0ZJQ?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)

It also gives everyone the same toolbox. We see it across the stack. Ads start to look alike. Landing pages promise the same things. Sales emails follow the same rhythm. The advantage moves to the choices you make before you press generate. ↳ Who you serve and the problem you refuse to dilute ↳ The offer structure that makes a decision feel safe ↳ Where you show up and in what sequence ↳ What proof sits closest to the moment of choice ↳ How fast the next step happens after a click or a call With that clarity, the same model becomes a multiplier. But AI search doesn’t play by the same rules. 𝟭. 𝗦𝗘𝗢 𝗶𝘀𝗻’𝘁 𝗱𝗲𝗮𝗱, 𝗯𝘂𝘁 𝗚𝗘𝗢 𝗶𝘀 𝗮 𝗱𝗶𝗳𝗳𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗴𝗮𝗺𝗲. Google still drives the volume, but LLMs drive new types of queries. Some tools, like Perplexity and Gemini, rely on live web content. ChatGPT? It might cite a deindexed blog post if it’s clear, structured, and useful. → Rank still helps, but brand strength, clarity, and context are often more important. 𝟮. 𝗟𝗟𝗠𝘀 𝘀𝘂𝗿𝗳𝗮𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗮𝗻𝘀𝘄𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗻𝘂𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲𝗱, 𝗺𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶-𝗹𝗮𝘆𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗱 𝗾𝘂𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀, 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝗷𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗵𝗶𝗴𝗵-𝘃𝗼𝗹𝘂𝗺𝗲 𝗸𝗲𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗱𝘀. GEO focuses on thought paths. For example: → “I’m launching a luxury pet food brand — what kind of TikTok content would resonate with Gen Z pet owners?” → “Compare Shopify vs. WooCommerce for a one-person outdoor gear shop focused on rentals.” → “What’s a good rebranding strategy after a pricing controversy in fintech?” 𝟯. 𝗔𝗘𝗢 (𝗔𝗻𝘀𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗲 𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻) 𝗶𝘀 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝗳𝗿𝗮𝗺𝗲𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸. You don’t need to rank first. You need to be understood. That means: ✅ Headings phrased as questions ✅ Schema markup (FAQ, HowTo, Product) ✅ Modular answers ✅ Quotes, stats, lists — anything skimmable and factual 𝟰. 𝗟𝗟𝗠 𝘃𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗱𝗼𝗲𝘀𝗻’𝘁 𝗮𝗹𝘄𝗮𝘆𝘀 𝗺𝗲𝗮𝗻 𝗰𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸𝘀, 𝗯𝘂𝘁 𝗶𝘁 𝗮𝗯𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗲𝗹𝘆 𝗱𝗿𝗶𝘃𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀. Users might not visit your site immediately, but if your brand keeps showing up in AI chats, they’ll remember it. → Track spikes in branded search and direct traffic → Talk to your sales team — they’ll tell you what content closed the deal 𝟱. 𝗬𝗼𝘂 𝗰𝗮𝗻 𝗻𝗼𝘄 𝗺𝗲𝗮𝘀𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 “𝗔𝗜 𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝘃𝗼𝗶𝗰𝗲.” The Semrush AI Toolkit shows: ✅ Where your brand shows up in ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity ✅ How you compare to competitors ✅ Which topics and questions you're being cited for ✅ Whether the sentiment is helping or hurting your brand What other GEO trends are you seeing these days?   * [ ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/9c8pery4andzj6ohjkjp54ma2) Nicola Agius  Reach plc • 5K followers ](https://uk.linkedin.com/in/nicola-agius-8b330956?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts_face-pile-cta) ### [ How do you optimise for AI search? Lily Ray, Kevin Indig, Ross Hudgens and Steve Toth just shared what’s actually working for LLM visibility, based on their own experiences. Key takeaways 👇 🎯 Advertorials work: LLMs don’t yet differentiate between paid and organic content. 🎯 Syndication can scale visibility: But quality matters more than quantity. Do this cautiously by prioritising reputable, relevant publications. 🎯 Map pages to every audience and use case you serve: This theoretically helps you appear when AI search becomes more personalised. 🎯 Homepage clarity: Your homepage should explicitly state who you serve and what you do. Don’t rely on navigation menus for LLM understanding – the homepage is more easily parsed than a nav bar. 🎯 Optimise your footer: Brand and service signals get picked up here! 🎯 Don’t prioritise llm.txt: No major LLM has confirmed using it – including Google. 🎯 Go multimodal: Repurpose core content across text, video, audio, and imagery. The goal is brand recognition across the full range of sources an LLM may pull from. 🎯 Promote your brand narrative: It reportedly takes 250 documents to meaningfully influence an LLM’s perception. If you’re not putting content out, you’re leaving space for others to define your brand instead. 🎯 Freshness is key: But avoid artificial “refreshing” that adds no value. 🎯 Social works fast: If you have a strong following on LinkedIn, posts or LinkedIn Pulse articles can appear in AI search within hours – sometimes minutes! The same applies to Reddit, YouTube, and other social platforms. 🎯 Visible FAQs matter: So don’t hide them in accordions. There’s plenty of overlap with SEO, but the nuance here was key. Easily one of the most actionable AEO / GEO talks I’ve attended. Great panel, Bernard Huang 👏  `` `` ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/bn39hirwzjqj18ej1fkz55671) ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/a0e8rff6djeoq8iympcysuqfu) ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/2tzoeodxy0zug4455msr0oq0v) 267  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 27 Comments  ](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nicola-agius-8b330956_how-do-you-optimise-for-ai-search-lily-ray-activity-7422348625911058433-Qo52?trk=public_profile_relatedPosts)

What if your A/B test results could sit inside GA4, side-by-side with the rest of your user journey data?

In this short walkthrough, Ruben de Boer from Conversion Ideas shows how to connect any Convert experiment to Google Analytics 4:

Because when your test data lives inside GA4:

- You can compare behavior across control and variation audiences.

- You can run deeper analyses, using exploration reports or ad-hoc comparisons.

- You can connect experiments to long-term metrics, not just micro-conversions.

This integration enhances your entire workflow and expands how you approach experimentation, shifting the focus from isolated snapshots to full-funnel, connected insights.

➤ Set up project-level integration so GA4 audiences are created automatically

➤ Read variation IDs using Convert’s preview mode

➤ Cross-verify results with free significance calculators like ours

Running the test is step one. Interpreting the story behind the data is where the impact happens.

We believe in making data easy to access and hard to ignore.

GA4 integration is just one step in that direction.

Anything we should be aware of? ✅ I would recommend being cautious with this approach. Here are some of the things to be aware of: - Since data is pulled from AA, it doesn't go through the Edge network and has the highest level of latency of all upgrades path. - Data brought in this way cannot be shared with other Adobe Experience Platform applications; it is constrained to Customer Journey Analytics only. - It will make it more difficult to get rid of Adobe Analytics in the future, as you'll continue to be heavily depending on it. 💡 While the Source Connector is a great option for historic data, it’s not a long-term solution. At Accrease, we typically recommend migrating to Web SDK as part of your move to CJA – especially if you want a scalable, future-proof setup that can support more than just reporting. If you’re still unsure what makes the most sense in your case, feel free to send me a DM. Follow 🔔 • Like 👍 • Comment ✍ • Repost ♻️  `` `` ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/bn39hirwzjqj18ej1fkz55671) ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/a0e8rff6djeoq8iympcysuqfu) ![](https://static.licdn.com/aero-v1/sc/h/asiqslyf4ooq7ggllg4fyo4o2) 22  `` `` `` `` `` `` `` 3 Comments  ![𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐬𝐤𝐞𝐝...

❓We just licensed for CJA and are planning on using the Adobe Analytics Source Connector. Anything we should be aware of?

✅ I would recommend being cautious with this approach. Here are some of the things to be aware of:

- Since data is pulled from AA, it doesn't go through the Edge network and has the highest level of latency of all upgrades path.

- Data brought in this way cannot be shared with other Adobe Experience Platform applications; it is constrained to Customer Journey Analytics only.

- It will make it more difficult to get rid of Adobe Analytics in the future, as you'll continue to be heavily depending on it.

💡 While the Source Connector is a great option for historic data, it’s not a long-term solution. 

At Accrease, we typically recommend migrating to Web SDK as part of your move to CJA – especially if you want a scalable, future-proof setup that can support more than just reporting.

If you’re still unsure what makes the most sense in your case, feel free to send me a DM. I'm happy to take a quick look at your situation and share an honest recommendation – no strings attached.

#clientquestion #AdobeAnalytics #AdobeCustomerJourneyAnalytics #CJA

### Acting as tech architects,   
Devoteam guides AI-driven transformations
Born in the early days of the tech revolution, Devoteam has been a **trusted guide** through the rise of the internet, the cloud, and now, the exciting potential of AI.
But for us, tech is just a tool. Our real passion is empowering people. With over**11,000 tech natives in 25+ countries** across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, you can count on our capacity to manage large-scale, ambitious projects. Yet, we remain agile enough to deliver customised solutions.
Our unique partnerships with platforms like **AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft and ServiceNow** translate into award-winning market recognition and our customers’ trust.

Interactive Content
### Experiences that hold attention—and convert
Most data collection tools lose people halfway through. BlueConic Experiences keep customers engaged from start to submit—with interactive content that feels like a conversation, not a form.  
  
Whether you're offering personalized recommendations, unlocking exclusive offers, or guiding purchase decisions, each experience delivers real value. That’s why people complete them—and why you capture more insights.
[See How Marmot Does It](https://www.blueconic.com/resources/how-smart-brands-turn-fewer-options-into-more-sales)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6917e7faf3c529f1539ed66d/692b062eff87b3d30a12047c_jacket-quiz.avif)
First-Party Data Capture
### Get the audience insights your competitors can’t
Every experience gives your customers a reason to share what they want, need, and care about—directly with you. That’s declared data: clean, consented, and ready to use.  
  
It’s the kind of insight you can’t rent or guess—and the kind most brands struggle to collect. Launch fast with proven templates, build from scratch, or let AI handle the heavy lifting.
[See How NARS Does It](https://www.blueconic.com/customers/how-nars-engages-customers-through-experiences-by-jebbit)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6917e7faf3c529f1539ed66d/692b062e0fc65f3660f5ebbb_skin-quiz.avif)
Native CDP Integration
### Activate every insight in real time
BlueConic offers the only experience builder fully integrated with a real-time CDP. Every response flows straight into our CDP's customer profiles—automatically. No file exports. No stitching. No delays.  
  
That means you can trigger instant personalization, optimize messaging, and drive conversion across every channel—starting from the first interaction.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6917e7faf3c529f1539ed66d/692a0b74df32a158bf16c317_quiz-offer.avif)

without hassle

# Kies voor meer dan fitness
Meer sporten. Minder betalen. 
## NU: Krijg tot 170 euro cadeau 
**Word nu lid en sport tot 8 weken gratis.**  
**De inschrijving krijg je cadeau.**
  * FITNESS + 4 weken extra
  * GROUP + 6 weken extra
  * ALL-IN +8 weken extra
  * Gratis inschrijving ter waarde van €50,00

## Kom sporten bij Jims 
Ben je klaar om de stap te zetten? Dit doe je uiteraard niet alleen. Bij Jims kies je zelf hoeveel coaching je wil en dat bepaalt jouw abonnement!
  * Ben je een starter? Bij het ALL-IN abonnement bieden we een choachingstraject op maat
  * Sporten doe je niet alleen. Groepslessen kan je volgen bij ons GROUP of ALL-IN plan
  * Zin om je eigen ding te doen? Dan is FITNESS voor jou. Onbeperkt toegang tot al onze clubs
  * Nog niet helemaal overtuigd? Vraag een gratis probeerpas aan en kom een dagje testen


[ Word lid ](https://www.jims.be/checkout?subscription=group) [ Vraag je probeerpas aan ](https://www.jims.be/nl/probeerpas)

Extra
## Ontdek jouw sportprofiel 
Ben jij klaar om te ontdekken welke sporter er écht in jou schuilt? Met een korte vragenlijst krijg je een persoonlijk sportprofiel dat je helpt om het maximale uit je training te halen.
  * Exclusieve toegang tot een contentplatform vol inspiratie
  * Praktische trainingsschema’s die aansluiten bij jouw profiel
  * Gezonde recepten om je energie en prestaties te boosten
  * Handige tips & inzichten om met plezier en resultaat te sporten


[ Start nu en ontdek jouw sportprofiel ](https://www.jims.be/nl/quiz)

Begeleiding
## Kine bij Jims
Bij Jims draait het niet alleen om trainen, maar ook om gezond en sterk blijven. Daarom werken we samen met ervaren kinesitherapeuten van SPRS en PRIME Fysio.  
Onze partners brengen hun top-expertise rechtstreeks naar onze clubs, zodat jij altijd kan rekenen op de beste begeleiding.
Of je nu:
  * herstelt van een blessure,
  * blessures wil voorkomen,
  * of jouw prestaties naar een hoger niveau wil tillen


Of je nu wil herstellen van een blessure, blessures voorkomen of sterker presteren—onze partners staan voor je klaar.
[ Maak vandaag nog een afspraak ](https://www.jims.be/nl/aanbod/kine)

##  Discover The Jirav Difference: 
![Frame 3178](https://www.jirav.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Outliant%20Homepage/Frame%203178.png?width=425&height=408&name=Frame%203178.png)
Every dollar and every decision runs through accounting and finance.  
  
You are at the center of every key action…  
  
You are the finance hero and storyteller that needs to communicate to all stakeholders where the business is and where it’s going.  
  
And that’s why we created Jirav.  
  
We are the leading, all-in-one forecasting, budgeting, reporting, and dashboarding solution, purpose-built for accounting and finance heroes.  
  
Our powerful, integrated, and driver-based software forecasts the P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow, so you always have a pulse on where your cash position is today and where it’s headed in the future.   
  
Watch our video to see how the power of Jirav can help you unlock and tell your financial story. 
[ Watch Video ](https://www.jirav.com/hubfs/Why%20Jirav%20Video%201920x1080.mp4)
![Frame 3178](https://www.jirav.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Outliant%20Homepage/Frame%203178.png?width=425&height=408&name=Frame%203178.png)
Discover the world of **dynamic planning.**
![](https://www.jirav.com/hs-fs/hubfs/left-caret.png?width=8&name=left-caret.png)
01
####  Integrate Quickly 
Connect your accounting, workforce, and operational data in minutes to create the foundation of your planning and analytics engine.
02
####  Build Dynamically 
Construct budgets, forecasts, and multiple scenario plans to quickly analyze changes in the business, so you can stay on track to reach your growth milestones.
03
####  Analyze Intelligently 
Automate reporting and analytics; compare actuals to budget, along with multiple planning scenarios, to make real-time and informed business decisions.
![](https://www.jirav.com/hs-fs/hubfs/right-caret.png?width=8&name=right-caret.png)
Hindsight. Insight. Foresight. **All-in-one.**
Budgeting Gain control of your annual planning and budgeting process, by ditching your outdated V50 Excel model. Embrace a dynamic approach that leverages our 3-statement, pro forma modeling, allowing you to easily create leadership-approved plans. 
Forecasting Spend less time building and more time analyzing. Easily adjust mid, long-range, and rolling forecasts in minutes. Keep a constant pulse on your cash flow and working capital assumptions, while forecasting out the pro forma income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement.
![jirav__dashboard-image](https://www.jirav.com/hs-fs/hubfs/jirav__dashboard-image.png?width=605&height=348&name=jirav__dashboard-image.png)
Planning Business strategy is constantly changing; your “I’ll get back to you” Excel model is not. Create multiple scenarios, based on board or leadership input, in a flash. This allows you to evaluate whether a new idea has merit, ensuring your decision-making is always informed. 
Reporting & Dashboarding Streamline your monthly close process. Create and deliver your financial packages with just a few clicks, eliminating the stress of manual reporting. You can use industry-specific templates, or create customized reports, and share and collaborate with key stakeholders.
Budgeting
Gain control of your annual planning and budgeting process, by ditching your outdated V50 Excel model. Embrace a dynamic approach that leverages our 3-statement, pro forma modeling, allowing you to easily create leadership-approved plans. 
Forecasting
Spend less time building and more time analyzing. Easily adjust mid, long-range, and rolling forecasts in minutes. Keep a constant pulse on your cash flow and working capital assumptions, while forecasting out the pro forma income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement.
Planning
Business strategy is constantly changing; your “I’ll get back to you” Excel model is not. Create multiple scenarios, based on board or leadership input, in a flash. This allows you to evaluate whether a new idea has merit, ensuring your decision-making is always informed. 
Reporting & Dashboarding
Streamline your monthly close process. Create and deliver your financial packages with just a few clicks, eliminating the stress of manual reporting. You can use industry-specific templates, or create customized reports, and share and collaborate with key stakeholders.

## 2026 Peak Performance highlights
This year’s [_Peak Performance_ roofing report](https://www.jobnimbus.com/peak-performance/roofing) reveals what separates the most profitable, highly rated roofing companies from the rest of the pack. The data shows that the most profitable, trusted, and future-ready roofers run tighter operations, faster communication, and smarter tech.
[Download the report](https://www.jobnimbus.com/peak-performance/roofing)
### 45% 
**Answer first**
Nearly half of top-rated roofing companies respond to new leads in 30 minutes or less. Everyone else is letting the phone ring and handing jobs to competitors.
### 79% 
**Already systemized**
Almost eight out of ten roofers run their business in a CRM now. If you are still juggling spreadsheets and texts, you are already behind the pack.
### 43%
**Sell more work**
Forty-three percent of high-volume roofers offer solar, collecting more revenue on every job while others walk away after the roof is done.
### 21-40%
**Is the ceiling**
Most roofing companies live in a 21 to 40 percent gross profit range. The difference between scraping by and winning big comes down to execution, not luck.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/68b8668fe80f2aef9f62be63_quickbooks-brand-preferred-logo-50-50-black-external.png)
FEATURED INTEGRATION
### Quickbooks Online
Sync your contacts, jobs, products & services, estimates, invoices, and payments with your QuickBooks account. Compatible with QuickBooks Desktop, Online, & Server.
![QXO.com](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/6837e07511b60fd511cba3b9_qxo_icon.png)
FEATURED INTEGRATION
### QXO.com
Build estimates using QXO materials and up-to-the-minute pricing. Eliminate double-entry by sending your material orders to QXO.com with just one click.
![company cam logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/679a1eff339fe53135b3d6b4_company-cam-logo.svg)
FEATURED INTEGRATION
### CompanyCam
Make your projects more visual by easily taking pictures, annotating and share them, and keep them organized by date and location.
![eagle view logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/679a1eff0772504d5a2f581e_eagle-view-logo.svg)
FEATURED INTEGRATION
### EagleView
Order accurate aerial measurements for the roofs you’re working on right from JobNimbus and get them attached to the job folder once they’re ready. Save time and reduce risk of injury.
![sumo quote logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/679a1efe25270d3caaa4e1bb_sumo-quote-logo.svg)
FEATURED INTEGRATION
### SumoQuote
Now part of the JobNimbus family. Build custom quotes that impress clients and win more work. With SumoQuote, your quotes instantly become winning sales presentation tools. Quotes are beautiful, well thought out, and professional.
![sunlight logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/679a1eff811c06d3ca9eec84_sunlight-logo.svg)
FEATURED INTEGRATION
### Sunlight Financial
Apply for customer financing right from your job inside JobNimbus. Get instant rate quotes and provide different financing options to your customers.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6787de296c2d0f1df5b0c942/684299a11ee24efc39d02d17_Page-Starter.webp)

JobScore was built to help teams simplify and improve their hiring. You can do most of your day-to-day recruiting work on just 3 pages.   
See how your team can work from a personalized to-do list, review candidates, make decisions, and move candidates through your hiring process.
[Watch the basics video](https://www.jobscore.com/jobscore-basics/)

## Customers love their recruiting results
### But don’t take our word for it, take it from them
Avispa cuts talent acquisition costs by 40% with JobScore
Our previous ATS was feature-rich but it was so complicated that people didn’t use it. JobScore is intuitive and user-friendly, so our recruiters actually use it, and we realize all its benefits.”

Manager of Recruitment
