[IT Leaders](https://www.jobscore.com/)
[Candidates](https://www.jobscore.com/)
![Recruiting software for talent acquisition leaders](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Plan, measure, and manage
[Work the way you want](https://www.jobscore.com/features/#work-the-way-you-want), establish service-level agreements, [control employee access](https://www.jobscore.com/features/ats-features/), and make [data-driven decisions](https://www.jobscore.com/features/hiring-decision/) using [customizable dashboards](https://www.jobscore.com/features/recruitment-dashboard/) & [analytics](https://www.jobscore.com/features/#measure-and-optimize)
Improve Efficiency
Make your entire team wildly productive by eliminating time-consuming, manual [sourcing](https://www.jobscore.com/#sourcers), [scheduling](https://www.jobscore.com/features/interview-scheduling/), [screening](https://www.jobscore.com/features/interview-feedback/), and [reporting](https://www.jobscore.com/features/#measure-and-optimize) tasks.
Engage and Impress Everyone
Delight [candidates](https://www.jobscore.com/#role-candidates), [managers](https://www.jobscore.com/#hiring-managers), [recruiters](https://www.jobscore.com/#recruiters), and [interviewers](https://www.jobscore.com/#interviewers) with tailored personalized experiences. Drive adoption with [onboarding checklists](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/onboarding-checklist/).
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Talent acquisition software for recruiting leaders](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Click less and recruit more
Powerful automation frees you up to do more strategic, impactful work. [Candidate scoring](https://www.jobscore.com/#scores) zeros in on who’s qualified.
Low-effort candidate pipeline
Execute every tactic: [post on job boards](https://www.jobscore.com/features/job-posting-site/), [employee referral campaigns](https://www.jobscore.com/features/employee-referral-program/), rediscover talent, [manage search firms](https://www.jobscore.com/features/vendor-management-system/), and more.
A single source of truth
Make transparency and shared accountability the new normal by connecting everyone’s [email](https://www.jobscore.com/#emails), [calendar](https://www.jobscore.com/#schedules), and [more](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/).
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Talent acquisition software for recruiting coordinators](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Self-schedule interviews
Send scheduling requests with 1 click. Monitor scheduling status. Automatically send [interview reminders](https://www.jobscore.com/features/recruiting-reminders/#interview-reminders).
Master calendar Tetris
Set preferred interviewers and scorecards per job. Easily [juggle multiple people’s free/busy](https://www.jobscore.com/features/interview-scheduling/#master-calendar-tetris). Send [perfect invites](https://www.jobscore.com/features/interview-scheduling/#publish-perfect-events) with complete interview panel data.
Run reports with 1 click
Stop spending hours updating spreadsheets. Save and bookmark [self-service reports](https://www.jobscore.com/features/#measure-and-optimize) & share them in no time flat.
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for sourcers](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Search, tag, and filter
Search candidates and notes with boolean operators. Save searches. [Score candidates](https://staging-corpsite-new.jobscore.com/features/submit-resume/#score-candidates). Add and edit tags.
LinkedIn Recruiter System Connect
[Synchronize data between LinkedIn Recruiter and JobScore](https://www.jobscore.com/linkedin-recruiter-launch/#recruiter-system-connect). Save up to 3 hours a week by streamlining workflows.
Integrate any tool
Add resumes one by one, in bulk, or by simply sending an email. Integrate 3rd party sourcing tools using the [JobScore Hire API](https://developers.jobscore.com).
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for human resources and hr professionals](https://www.jobscore.com/)
DE&I, compliance, & internal mobility
Securely collect and analyze gender, race, disability, and veteran status data. Use [diversity questions](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/diversity-questions-reporting/) and [insights](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/diversity-questions-reporting/) to meet goals. Promote mobility with an [internal job board](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/internal-company-job-board/).
Connect to leading HRIS & onboarding platforms
Integrate JobScore with your preferred [HRIS and Onboarding platform](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/?types\[\]=HRIS). Eliminate data entry and create a seamless hiring experience.
Powerful recruiting features when you need them
If you have recruiting responsibility, leverage powerful features for [sourcing](https://www.jobscore.com/#sourcers), [coordinating](https://www.jobscore.com/#coordinators), [full cycle recruiting](https://www.jobscore.com/#recruiters), and [talent acquisition leadership](https://www.jobscore.com/#ta-leaders).
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for executives](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Easy job & offer approvals
Use powerful, customizable, multi-step, mobile-optimized approval chains to control when jobs can be opened and job offer terms. 
Visibility & metrics
Easily see what’s open, how things are going, and whether KPIs are trending up or down.
Never miss a trick
Avoid recruiting bottlenecks by [customizing alerts](https://www.jobscore.com/features/candidate-alerts/) and [accessing JobScore from your mobile device](https://www.jobscore.com/features/submit-resume/#work-when-you-want).
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for hiring managers](https://www.jobscore.com/)
See your pipeline at a glance
Access the real-time information you need about every job and candidate from anywhere.
Your process, your way
Maximize your chance of hiring top performers by [working the way you want](https://www.jobscore.com/features/#work-the-way-you-want), as a team, on a [job-by-job basis](https://www.jobscore.com/features/hiring-process/#templates-for-each-job). Customize workflow steps, hiring team members, forms, interview questions, and more.
Only log in if you want to
If you don’t want to log in over the web or mobile, [easily work from your email](https://www.jobscore.com/features/recruitment-process/#drive-process) and JobScore keeps everything in sync.
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for interviewers](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Easily run great interviews
[Everything you need on one page](https://www.jobscore.com/features/interview-feedback/#one-screen): a formatted resume, the job description, video conferencing link, questions, rating criteria, interview panel details, and more.
Share or apply for open jobs
See every open job at your company and either apply yourself or help recruit by [sharing jobs on social networks](https://www.jobscore.com/features/social-recruiting/) or by email.
Make referrals and track their progress
[Refer people for jobs](https://www.jobscore.com/features/employee-referral-program/#referral-portal), share what makes them great for a role, and then track how they move through the recruiting process.
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for IT leaders](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Security & Compliance
JobScore is hosted in the Amazon cloud and is [SOC2 Type II compliant](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/jobscore-achieves-soc2-type-ii-compliance/). We help our customers meet [EEO](https://www.jobscore.com/features/offcp-eeo-compliance/), [OFCCP](https://www.jobscore.com/features/offcp-eeo-compliance/), [GRPR](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/gdpr-compliance/), [CCPA](https://www.jobscore.com/blog/ccpa-compliance/), and other compliance regulations.
SSO & Pre-built Integrations
Make it easy for your team to securely log in without a password using [Google, Microsoft, OpenID, or SAML](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/?types\[\]=Single+Sign+On+%26+Identity+Provider). Easily connect [email](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/?types\[\]=Email+Synchronization), [calendar](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/?types\[\]=Calendar+%26+Scheduling), [conferencing](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/?types\[\]=Video+Conferencing), [HRIS platforms](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/?types\[\]=HRIS), and [more](https://www.jobscore.com/integrations/).
APIs, Webhooks, and more
Build any integration you need with [webhooks](https://developers.jobscore.com/#webhooks), the [Hire API](https://developers.jobscore.com), and [Zapier](https://zapier.com/apps/jobscore/integrations). Build custom data visualizations using our [business Intelligence connector](https://support.jobscore.com/hc/en-us/articles/360034404272-How-can-I-build-my-own-reports-) and your favorite reporting platform.
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)
![Recruiting software for candidates](https://www.jobscore.com/)
Promote your employment brand
[Impress candidates](https://www.jobscore.com/features/#impress-candidates) and provide a window into your culture with [images, videos, maps, and team profiles](https://www.jobscore.com/features/career-page/#job-descriptions). Customize your theme to [match your logo and brand](https://www.jobscore.com/features/career-page/#beautiful-carrers-site).
Craft Impressive Experiences
Provide candidates with a modern, impressive experience from start to finish: [job descriptions](https://www.jobscore.com/features/career-page/#job-descriptions), [job application forms](https://www.jobscore.com/features/job-application-form/#applicant-form), [emails](https://www.jobscore.com/#emails), [forms](https://www.jobscore.com/#forms), [offers](https://www.jobscore.com/#offers), and more.
Be Responsive and Polite
Combine [candidate scoring](https://www.jobscore.com/#scores) with automatic [correspondence tracking](https://www.jobscore.com/features/collaborative-hiring/#synchronize-candidate-email), [overdue alerts](https://www.jobscore.com/features/candidate-alerts/#overdue-alerts), and [email templates](https://www.jobscore.com/features/collaborative-hiring/#candidate-communication) to provide timely, polite responses.
[Get Started](https://www.jobscore.com/get-started/)

# Construction Management Software
## The New Standard for Managing Construction Projects
JobTread empowers you with simple yet powerful construction estimating and project management software to help you tackle projects more efficiently. Get organized, complete your projects on time, and increase your profits.
[Watch a Full Demo ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nP9xQweELFc)
![](https://www.jobtread.com/images/videos/jobtread-in-five-minutes.webp)![Play Video](https://www.jobtread.com/images/template/video-btn.svg)
[Watch a Full Demo ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nP9xQweELFc)
![10,0000 Strong](https://www.jobtread.com/images/press-release/2026-02-10k-b-1920.webp)
Featured News Post
## JobTread Surpasses 10,000 Companies!
JobTread announced today at the International Builders' Show (IBS) that more than 10,000 construction companies now run their businesses using JobTread!
[Read Article ](https://www.jobtread.com/news/jobtread-surpasses-10000-customers-highlighting-rapid-shift-in-construction-industry)
## Who is JobTread For
Construction software to keep your jobs and your business on track and on budget
### [Home Builders Our construction management software is a game-changer for home builders, offering organized resource tracking, progress monitoring, and effective budget management. ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/home-builders)### [Remodelers From small renovations to large-scale remodeling projects, JobTread provides remodelers with comprehensive tools to manage every aspect of their operations. ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/remodelers)### [Commercial Contractors JobTread thrives in addressing the distinct challenges of small-mid sized commercial construction projects using customized with tailored, innovative features ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/commercial-contractors)### [Pool Builders Building a pool? Our construction project tracking software ensures seamless coordination and progress tracking so that nothing slips through the cracks. ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/pool-builders)### [Outdoor Living Contractors For those crafting beautiful outdoor living spaces, JobTread's software assists in managing complex projects with ease. ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/outdoor-living)### [Specialty Contractors Whether you're a plumber, electrician, or any other specialty contractor, JobTread offers specialized tools to track tasks, manage teams, and monitor project progress. ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/specialty-contractors)### [Roofers JobTread simplifies roofing business management providing accurate estimates, project tracking, and profitability. ](https://www.jobtread.com/who-we-serve/roofers)

![Contractor closing a business deal with the help of JobTread construction CRM](https://www.jobtread.com/images/home/feature-callouts/sales-estimating-lifestyle.webp)![](https://www.jobtread.com/images/home/feature-callouts/sales-estimating-2.webp)![](https://www.jobtread.com/images/home/feature-callouts/sales-estimating-1.webp)
### [Sales & Estimating](https://www.jobtread.com/features#sales-and-estimating)
#### Close More Deals, Faster
Simplify your sales process so you can win more jobs in less time. With everything you need at your fingertips, you can generate more opportunities and increase your win rate by delivering professional proposals faster and with improved accuracy.
[Learn More ](https://www.jobtread.com/features#sales-and-estimating)

### [Project Management](https://www.jobtread.com/features#project-management)
#### Stay On Time and On Budget
Keep your team on the same page. With JobTread, you’ll always know how your jobs are performing, in real-time. Eliminate error-prone and inefficient manual processes so you can complete your projects on time and do so more profitably.
[Learn More ](https://www.jobtread.com/features#project-management)

### [Job Finances](https://www.jobtread.com/features#job-finances)
#### Increase Your Profits
Know your numbers from start to finish. Deliver consistent pricing, control your costs, and identify problem areas as they occur to ensure you are always hitting your target profits. Improve cash flow with accurate and timely invoicing, billing, and payment schedules.
[Learn More ](https://www.jobtread.com/features#job-finances)

Provide your customers with an online portal to access all job related documents, communications, invoices/bills, and other important information. Share photos and files to keep everyone on the same page. And with the ability to collect eSignatures and online payments, everything is in one place.

## The best software and best service for one simple price!
We believe in building great software and delivering the highest level of customer service. At the end of the day, we're not successful if you are not successful. Sign up today and take the first step toward improving your business.
![](https://www.jobtread.com/images/videos/what-to-expect-travis-lee-2c.webp)![Play Video](https://www.jobtread.com/images/template/video-btn.svg)
Risk-free, 30 day money-back guarantee for monthly subscription
All features included
Unlimited jobs, documents, and files
Unlimited customer and vendor portal users
Data imports and pre-built job templates
First-class [implementation, training, and support](https://www.jobtread.com/resources/training)
Calculate Your Price
How many internal users will you have?
  * [Internal User](https://www.jobtread.com/#internal-users) start at $20/month.
  * [Tiered price breaks](https://www.jobtread.com/#price-chart) begin after 10 users.
  * All prices in US Dollars.


What is an internal user?
Internal users include employees who need access to JobTread to view customer and vendor information, manage jobs, build and modify schedules, track time, and access reports. Accountants and certain other non-employees may also be considered internal users if they need access to JobTread data.
All vendor, subcontractor, and customer users are able to access an external portal to view and perform a limited set of activities in JobTread. These users are free and unlimited. Additionally, certain field crew who will only be using JobTread to upload pictures, log daily notes, and view their schedule or check off tasks can also be added as free users.
Tiered price breaks for additional users
Your subscription includes one user. The monthly cost for adding additional internal users is as follows:

* Note: Price breaks are only for the users in their respective tiers.

# THE ST. JOE COMPANY
### Connect. People. Place.
On the surface, The St. Joe Company is a Northwest Florida based real estate developer and asset manager—focused on thoughtfully planned destinations to live, work, play, shop, and vacation near the region's beautiful white sand beaches.
Dig a little deeper and you'll discover that the essence of what we do is **_connect people to place._** We seek to create enduring communities that embody a distinct lifestyle and to cultivate experiences inspired by the natural beauty and character of the Emerald Coast.
What to know more? Read our brochure **[online](https://issuu.com/stjoecompany/docs/about_joe_brochure?fr=xKAE9_zU1NQ)** or **[have one mailed](https://www.signupanywhere.com/signup/stjoebrochure)** to you.

St. Joe Spotlight
  

Tour of St. Joe Commercial Properties
WATCH: JOE COMMERCIAL ASSETS TOUR
From commerce parks to town centers to office suites and warehouses, St. Joe’s more than one million square feet of leasable commercial assets create spaces for businesses large and small. Enjoy a tour of St. Joe commercial properties throughout Northwest Florida.
[](https://youtu.be/fX3Ki_c3EYA)
A collection of communities, hotels, activities and experiences
WATCH: WATERSOUND LIFESTYLE
Under the Watersound® brand, The St. Joe Company is proud to have developed and to offer a collection of extraordinary communities, hotels and resorts, amenities and experiences for residents and visitors, all located along the Gulf Coast of Northwest Florida. Our neighborhoods, tourist destinations and the community assets that support them are coming about in concert. There is much growth to come, but all of it will be consistent with a commitment to blend in with our surroundings. Find YOUR place at WATERSOUND.COM.
[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_MYmXEfs3tM)
Panama City Metro Area Continues to Grow
Panama City Metro Area Ranks 2nd Nationally for Population Growth
"The Panama City-Panama City Beach metro area ranks second in the country for percentage growth from 2023 to 2024, according to the most recent available U.S. Census data."
[](https://www.wjhg.com/2025/12/17/panama-city-metro-area-ranks-second-nationally-population-growth/?outputType=amp)
The Gateway to Watersound
WATCH: State Road 79 Corridor
The St. Joe Company is focused on connecting people to place by creating communities where people, assets, and activity thrive together. Along the State Road 79 corridor in Panama City Beach, FL, this vision is coming to life, with growth measured not just in traffic counts and square feet, but in quality of life and lasting value. Watch the video below and hear from St. Joe leadership as they share the vision for this exciting area, which serves as a gateway to the Watersound lifestyle.
[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rveZjNextQM)

St. Joe News
##### Stay Up To Date With The St. Joe Company
  

Coveted Forbes Travel Guide Rating
Camp Creek Inn Earns Four-Star Rating
Camp Creek Inn, St. Joe's boutique hospitality offering in Inlet Beach, Florida, has earned a coveted Four-Star rating from Forbes Travel Guide. Opened July 2023, Camp Creek Inn reached this notable achievement in under three years, a rare and ambitious timeline.
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/camp-creekr-inn-earns-coveted-four-star-rating-forbes-travel)
Commencement of Development
Publix at Watersound West Bay Center
"Commencing development of the Publix at Watersound West Bay Center marks an exciting milestone for this center," said William Brock, St. Joe Vice President of Commercial Real Estate. "This step brings us closer to delivering a highly anticipated shopping destination to the area and specifically for the nearby residents of Latitude Margaritaville Wateresound and Ward Creek communities."
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/st-joe-company-announces-commencement-development-publix-super)
National Retail Tenants Coming Soon
Watersound Town Center New Tenants
FP Movement, Monkee's, Hemline, Sunset Shoes & Lifestyles and Johnnie-O among the new tenants announced at Watersound Town Center. These national retailers are anticipated to open in mid-2026. Watersound Town Center is 98% leased and features approximately 150,000 square feet of retail, restaurant and office space with plans for 400,000 total square feet.
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/watersoundr-town-center-announces-new-tenants-growth-accelerates)
Daily Flights Starting in November
Expanded Direct Flights from NYC to ECP
The St. Joe Company celebrates the announcement of expanded nonstop daily flights between Northwest Florida Beaches International Airport (ECP) in Panama City, FL and LaGuardia Airport (LGA) in New York City. This announcement comes on the heels of the previously announced seasonal Saturday service offered by Delta Air Lines for Summer 2025. The new daily service will start November 6, 2025.
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/expanded-nonstop-daily-flights-create-year-round-access-travel)

"This step brings us closer to delivering a highly anticipated shopping destination to the area and specifically for the nearby residents of Latitude Margaritaville Wateresound and Ward Creek communities."
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/st-joe-company-announces-commencement-development-publix-super)
National Retail Tenants Coming Soon
Watersound Town Center New Tenants
FP Movement, Monkee's, Hemline, Sunset Shoes & Lifestyles and Johnnie-O among the new tenants announced at Watersound Town Center. These national retailers are anticipated to open in mid-2026. Watersound Town Center is 98% leased and features approximately 150,000 square feet of retail, restaurant and office space with plans for 400,000 total square feet.
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/watersoundr-town-center-announces-new-tenants-growth-accelerates)
Daily Flights Starting in November
Expanded Direct Flights from NYC to ECP
The St. Joe Company celebrates the announcement of expanded nonstop daily flights between Northwest Florida Beaches International Airport (ECP) in Panama City, FL and LaGuardia Airport (LGA) in New York City. This announcement comes on the heels of the previously announced seasonal Saturday service offered by Delta Air Lines for Summer 2025. The new daily service will start November 6, 2025.
[](https://ir.joe.com/news-releases/news-release-details/expanded-nonstop-daily-flights-create-year-round-access-travel)

## High-Volume Operations Break “Traditional Staffing Software”
## Generic staffing platforms treat warehouse shifts like office recruiting.   
They give you an ATS when you need an operations command center.
## Not built for recruiters & coordinators dispatching workers
  * Group 5 Copy 17 2 You're running 50+ shifts per week.
  * Group 5 Copy 17 2 Your clients expect same-day fills.
  * Group 5 Copy 17 2 Your coordinators are drowning.


![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20800%20545%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)
## Not built for recruiters & coordinators dispatching workers
  * Group 5 Copy 17 2 Manual scheduling.
  * Group 5 Copy 17 2 Timesheet corrections. 
  * Group 5 Copy 17 2 Payroll exceptions.

## Speed, Visibility, and Payroll Accuracy
## Speed at Scale
## Fill open shifts in hours instead of waiting 3–5 days.
  * Multi-channel sourcing & recruitment
  * AI-powered screening & assessment
  * Candidate onboarding through web & mobile apps
  * Credentialing & compliance management


## See Everything. Right Now.
## Real-time visibility into every shift, every worker, and every location, enabling faster and smarter decisions.
  * Workforce scheduling and real-time dispatch coordination that keeps teams aligned, responsive, and fully optimized
  * Biometric time clocks and mobile apps that capture precise time, attendance, and workforce activity in real time
  * Attendance monitoring and no-show tracking for accurate, dependable staffing
  * Workforce performance analytics that provide clear insights into productivity, efficiency, and workforce trends


## Payroll Without Exceptions
## 97% timesheet accuracy. <2% payroll exceptions.
  * Payroll integration (Quickbooks, ADP, Paychex, others)
  * Automated pre-payroll exception detection
  * Smart automated billing and invoicing
  * Real-time visibility into profit margins and performance

## Purpose-Built for High-Volume Staffing
## Whether you're staffing warehouses, offices, or events—Jombone is built for how you actually work.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20840%20480%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)
## Light Industrial Staffing
Warehouse, manufacturing, logistics. High-volume, shift-based, speed-critical. Jombone handles the complexity of multi-site dispatch, varied shift patterns, and real-time coverage tracking.
[ Group 11 Light Industrial Solutions ](https://www.jombone.com/solutions-light-industrial/)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20840%20480%22%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Not Another ATS. An Operations Platform.
## Recruiting-only platforms like Bullhorn were built for permanent placements. Legacy systems can’t operate in real time at scale. Jombone was built for high-volume, shift-based work—where same-day fills, real-time visibility, and payroll accuracy are mission-critical.

Jordan's Furniture – not just a store, an experience! 
Jordan's Furniture offers the largest selection of quality name-brand furniture and mattresses in New England. Visit any of our locations in Connecticut, Massachusetts, Maine, New Hampshire or Rhode Island and experience the Jordan’s difference. Stroll through hundreds of designer-inspired living room furniture setups with sofas, sectionals, accent chairs, recliners, coffee tables, entertainment centers, and even ottomans. Choose from thousands of fabric, leather, and wood finish options that fit your style. Create your ideal dining space by perusing our dining room furniture. Choose a table, side chairs, server, or an entire dining room set to suit your unique style. We have an extensive selection of bedroom furniture, including dressers, nightstands, armoires, and more for everyone in the family. Let our Sleep Lab Technicians help you select the perfect mattress from the best brands in the industry. Our display of home office furniture will give you the urge to be productive. Our desks, file cabinets and bookcases are both stylish and functional. Have fun selecting the perfect pool table or gaming table for your family room. Select a bar, pub table or maybe even theatre seating to enjoy with family and friends. If you're looking to create the ultimate backyard retreat, explore our collection of outdoor furniture. Whether your style is rustic country, traditional or contemporary, we have the ideal furniture to complete your space. Jordan's Furniture offers the best prices every day on all of our furniture, area rugs, and more. Each store offers a unique experience for the entire family to enjoy. Have an adventure at one of our three ropes courses in Reading, New Haven, or South Portland. Visit one of our furniture stores and see for yourself why Jordan's Furniture is not just a store, it's an experience! 
© 2020-2026 Jordan's Furniture. All rights reserved.

#### JOSH.AI KEYNOTE 2026
# Home in Harmony
### 03.19.26
### 11 AM PST | 2 PM EST
[ LEARN MORE ](https://www.josh.ai/keynote-2026)
Josh was born out of the idea that your home should inspire, embolden, and delight you and the people around you. By utilizing advanced AI technologies, including natural interfaces like voice and touch, Josh orchestrates the technology in all aspects of your home to deliver an exciting and effortless living experience.
A simple button press meets limitless potential thanks to the next generation of handheld control. 
[ LEARN MORE ](https://josh.ai/edge)

Josh.ai is evolving beyond the smart home to deliver its supercharged JoshGPT assistant at home and on-the-go. 
[ LEARN MORE ](https://josh.ai/joshgpt/)
OK Josh,  
Play jazz, dim the lights and start the fireplace. Josh seamlessly integrates with your connected devices to provide a single, intuitive interface for smart home control and customization.

The Smart Home, Smarter
Simple
Josh is designed to empower every member of your family with intuitive control and intelligent assistance. Through touch, text, or natural voice commands, Josh provides unparalleled convenience. 
Private
Josh understands that trust and responsibility help make your house a home. All Josh products are engineered to continuously enhance protecting your data and wellbeing. 
Magical
Josh is aware of its surroundings and interprets context to make complex activations easy. All Josh interfaces are immensely powerful, while offering unmatched accessibility and personalization. 
Artificial Intelligence Built for Your Unique Lifestyle AI As Unique As Your Lifestyle
Future-Proof
Josh regularly receives over-the-air updates to continuously improve and expand upon your home intelligence experience. 
Proactive
Configure Josh automations and alerts to notify you if any strange actions or security vulnerabilities are detected. 
Personal
Tailor your experience via custom app settings and adjust Josh's personality with a variety of voices, accents, and responses. 
Seamless smart home integration 
Josh works with the best-in-class luxury smart home products. Don’t see a brand you’re looking for? Find more at [josh.ai/devices](https://www.josh.ai/devices).

Uncompromising Privacy
At Josh.ai, we believe that your privacy should be firmly protected and secured. Your data will never be shared for marketing purposes or sold for third-party advertisements, and you have the power to specify how much information your home collects. With Josh, you get limitless personalization along with unparalleled peace-of-mind that your information will be kept safe.

The Story Behind the Logo
Josh is a home’s best friend. And like a dog, Josh is intelligent, responsive, and learns his owner’s commands. While other smart home control systems only know one trick, Josh combines all aspects of smart homes into one friendly, well-trained responder. Josh is your companion, and always happy to see you come home.

# For you: Clarity after every send
See exactly who engaged, what resonated, and what to do next.
1
No more waiting around: See who viewed your deck, what they cared about, and how long they spent, so you know exactly how to move things forward.
2
For when you've outgrown links and attachments: Share documents where your content actually looks as good as it is.
3
Drag, drop, done: Package documents you're already sending without any friction or extra steps or searches through e-mail threads.
# For your buyer: One place, zero confusion
A single page they can share internally, with structure that makes decisions easier.
1
Give people everything they need, anytime: Things move forward asynchronously, so deliver value without any friction.
2
Relentless value creation: Minimize questions, confusion, or doubt by making your "value" accessible, shareable and memorable.
3
No complexity, just clarity: Delight buyers and customers with a simple home base for everything they need to make a decision – fast.

# 30% less Churn. 50% more Conversions. Automatically  
360 degree view of users and accounts. Built for Growth Teams  

![Lijntje gradient](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/6342a6a58c1d697f000673bb_lijntje_gradient.svg)![Main Sub Text handwritten](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/64a158af7647dffce852da8a_SubTag.png)
Journy turns your Mixpanel, Amplitude, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Intercom, Zendesk, and other data into automated revenue actions.  

Supports both pure-PLG and hybrid-SLG/PLG strategies.

## Turn product data into revenue growth  

Stop crunching data scattered across various sources, searching for revenue potential and churn risks.  

Collect product, customer and subscription data into journy.io, discover ideal customer profiles and their preferred product features, and engage with most-promising accounts and users.  

![Turn product data into signals](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/63593a1e91c9da08f30356ef_GraphicHome.svg)
## Built for B2B SaaS
Providing growth signals so you can predictably scale your business. Faster  

#### [Activation Increase activation rate by identifying non-activating users in real time and driving them to their first value moment automatically  Analyse feature importance, usage and impact.  Build key product metrics without SQL, nor coding.  Comply to GDPR and CCPA.  Easily create customer segments based on any product interaction. ](https://www.journy.io/plg/activation)
#### [Monetisation  Increase free-to-paid conversion by triggering monetisation only when users show clear intent to pay  Analyse feature importance, usage and impact.  Build key product metrics without SQL, nor coding.  Comply to GDPR and CCPA.  Easily create customer segments based on any product interaction. ](https://www.journy.io/plg/monetisation)
#### [Expantion Increase expansion revenue by identifying customers who have outgrown their plan and upgrading them at the right moment  Analyse feature importance, usage and impact.  Build key product metrics without SQL, nor coding.  Comply to GDPR and CCPA.  Easily create customer segments based on any product interaction. ](https://www.journy.io/plg/expantion)
#### [Retention Reduce churn by detecting early behavior decay and activating retention actions while customers can still be saved  Analyse feature importance, usage and impact.  Build key product metrics without SQL, nor coding.  Comply to GDPR and CCPA.  Easily create customer segments based on any product interaction. ](https://www.journy.io/plg/retention)
[Revenue Ops](https://www.journy.io/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-0)[Sales](https://www.journy.io/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-1)[Growth](https://www.journy.io/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-2)[Customer Success](https://www.journy.io/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-3)[Marketing](https://www.journy.io/#w-tabs-0-data-w-pane-4)
Build revenue playbooks based on how people use your product
Stop crunching CRM records and data sheets once a month, to find risks and opportunities. Organise your workflows around real-time PQL signals, playbook actions, and customer data from across your stack.  
  
 Work in the tools you already know and use  
 Give easy access to product data  
 PQL intelligence and actions, the moment it happens  
 All point'n'click, no SQL or coding needed
[Check out our use cases  ](https://www.journy.io/use-cases)
![Share Customer Data](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/60fe816de941fcc8899612bc_share-illu-3.png)
Detect which leads are hot. Sell more with less effort.
Stop wasting time on unqualified leads. Look out for promising product qualified leads that trigger specific buying signals, and make more meaningful calls, knowing which features they're interested in.  
  
 Get prioritized call lists, sorted by likelihood-to-buy  
 See unified view of each account and their users  
 Get cases with follow up tasks in your team inbox  
 Get tasks and product data in your existing CRM
[Check out our use cases  ](https://www.journy.io/use-cases)
![health score](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/60fb8f20079b66fcffe3d8d4_CS%20Score%20Board.png)
Easily test new PLG strategies and improve conversions
Try out new PQL conditions, assign different engagement variations, and monitor how conversions progress over time.   
  
 See which features are most frequently used  
 Quickly test new PQL conditions and actions  
 Prove which engagement playbooks work best  
 All point and click, no code required
[Check out our use cases  ](https://www.journy.io/use-cases)
![PQL Experiments](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/62ad93cccf4bfa107da7688b_PQL%20Experiments.png)
Onboard. Monitor product usage. Reduce churn, proactively.
Keep track of each individual user and account at scale, and get notified on expansion and cross-selling opportunities. Identify those who are at risk of churning, and pro-actively reach out to them.  
  
 Get notified on churn risk and expansion opportunities  
 Get cases with follow up tasks in your team inbox  
 See all account and user activities in one place  
 Collaborate with sales and marketing thru quick actions
[Check out our use cases  ](https://www.journy.io/use-cases)
![journy.io customer success use case](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/60fbdfe393089922f40caef4_home-illu_7.png)
Convert more through hyper-personal automations
Target the right audience at the right time with the right message. Your existing automations get power-boosted with customer engagement metrics.  
  
 Automatically add PQLs to engagement automations  
 Get product usage data in your existing marketing tools  
 Lower customer acquisition costs‍
[Check out our use cases  ](https://www.journy.io/use-cases)
![journy.io marketing use case](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/60fbdea357f2fab19084abe8_mark-illu_5.png)
[Check out our use cases  ](https://www.journy.io/use-cases)
![ICP and aha moments](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/64a072c775b440a72a28e50c_Discover%20impact%202.png)
1. Analyse
## Discover ideal customer profiles and their 'aha' moments
Get a deep understanding on common datapoints and key usage patterns that most impact acquisition, conversion, expansion and churn.  
No vanity metrics; just straightforward answers.  

2. Qualify
## Uncover signups worth engaging with
See what accounts and users are doing on your platform, in real-time, and get product qualification scores and signals, showing you who best to engage with, and why.  

![journy.io journey](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/6416c34539ac541d5d477d3d_Entire%20Journeys%204.png)
![Playbooks](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/6416d722507092e066a0ecb1_Playbooks%206.png)
3. Engage
## Run account-based user playbooks
Trigger playbook automations on specific users from most/least promising accounts to reach aspired conversion, expansion and retention goals. Optimize these plays over time.  

## Integrated with the tools you already use
![Lijntje gradient](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/6342a6a58c1d697f000673bb_lijntje_gradient.svg)
![Integrations](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/6246c72e1fc3940f424288ae_Integrations%203.png)
Orchestrate engagement processes with 3rd party apps, using live-synced real-time product data.  
journy.io starts email drip campaigns, creates sales tasks in your CRM, triggers in-app onboarding sequences, or sends team notifications on Slack.  

![Actions](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/60f55c91cd59a3c7416663cb/6406d638be87b13dd1eb2a9d_Actions%206.png)

# Home
![js2.jpg](https://publish-01.obsidian.md/access/599da60310a78cfd30ea6fd228437374/img/js2.jpg)
I'm Simon Michael, an experienced software engineer, sysadmin, free software maintainer, consultant and coach, based in Maui and Ireland. Joyful Systems is my consulting business.
simon@joyful.com | +1-310-795-0167 | HST (UTC-10)   
Mastodon: [@simonmic@fosstodon.org](https://fosstodon.org/@simonmic)  
Matrix chat: [@simonmic:matrix.org](https://matrix.to/#/@simonmic:matrix.org) (sm)  
Libera IRC: sm   
Code: [github.com/simonmichael](https://github.com/simonmichael) | [hub.darcs.net/simon](https://hub.darcs.net/simon) | [FOSS](https://joyful.com/FOSS)
I'm interested in many things, including FOSS, technologies, usability, communities, and personal/societal/planetary sustainability. In recent years I have been most involved with Plain Text Accounting, the Haskell programming language, and maintaining a large PHP ERP system.
* * *
**2025-01**  
Hello there visitor. If you're a domainer: I'm sorry, joyful.com is not for sale.
Currently I write most often in these places: FOSS chat rooms on matrix ([PTA](https://matrix.to/#/#plaintextaccounting-space:matrix.org) , [haskell](https://matrix.to/#/#haskell-space:matrix.org) ; also libera IRC); the [PTA forum](https://forum.plaintextaccounting.org) (and [reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/simonmic/) and [HN](https://news.ycombinator.com/threads?id=simonmic)); [mastodon](https://fosstodon.org/@simonmic); [hledger.org](https://hledger.org) and [plaintextaccounting.org](https://plaintextaccounting.org).
This year I am managing joyful.com with Obsidian Publish, to save time and encourage updates; alas this means you need javascript enabled to view it. In 2025 you'll see more FAQ/summary/wiki-style notes appearing here, sometimes temporarily until they find a more permanent home.

## Datenschutz-Präferenz
Wir benötigen Ihre Einwilligung, bevor Sie unsere Website weiter besuchen können.
Wenn Sie unter 16 Jahre alt sind und Ihre Einwilligung zu optionalen Services geben möchten, müssen Sie Ihre Erziehungsberechtigten um Erlaubnis bitten.
Wir verwenden Cookies und andere Technologien auf unserer Website. Einige von ihnen sind essenziell, während andere uns helfen, diese Website und Ihre Erfahrung zu verbessern.
Personenbezogene Daten können verarbeitet werden (z. B. IP-Adressen), z. B. für personalisierte Anzeigen und Inhalte oder die Messung von Anzeigen und Inhalten.
Weitere Informationen über die Verwendung Ihrer Daten finden Sie in unserer [Datenschutzerklärung](https://www.joyn.com/datenschutzerklaerung/).
Es besteht keine Verpflichtung, in die Verarbeitung Ihrer Daten einzuwilligen, um dieses Angebot zu nutzen.
Sie können Ihre Auswahl jederzeit unter [Einstellungen](https://www.joyn.com/) widerrufen oder anpassen.
Bitte beachten Sie, dass aufgrund individueller Einstellungen möglicherweise nicht alle Funktionen der Website verfügbar sind.
Einige Services verarbeiten personenbezogene Daten in den USA. Mit Ihrer Einwilligung zur Nutzung dieser Services willigen Sie auch in die Verarbeitung Ihrer Daten in den USA gemäß Art. 49 (1) lit. a GDPR ein. Der EuGH stuft die USA als ein Land mit unzureichendem Datenschutz nach EU-Standards ein. Es besteht beispielsweise die Gefahr, dass US-Behörden personenbezogene Daten in Überwachungsprogrammen verarbeiten, ohne dass für Europäerinnen und Europäer eine Klagemöglichkeit besteht.
Es folgt eine Liste der Service-Gruppen, für die eine Einwilligung erteilt werden kann. Die erste Service-Gruppe ist essenziell und kann nicht abgewählt werden.
  * Essenziell
  * Statistik
  * Marketing
  * Externe Medien

## Let’s Scale.

## We help direct‑to‑consumer brands acquire customers in paid media channels under a fixed cost‑per‑acquisition model.
### Who we are
Our software helps D2C brands manage a full customer acquisition engine with open access to hundreds of high-performance media buyers, bloggers, content-sites and publishers.
What is the difference? Compensation is based solely on performance: you only pay a fixed, agreed-upon fee for every acquired customer. Simple as that.

## Our Approach
We want to help your brand acquire new customers… lots of new customers. To ensure your success, we encourage on the following approach.
###  1 Angle Development
When setting up your offer, consider the compelling ‘hook’ or ‘angle’ that captivates your target audience. Your partners will build assets around the direction you provide.
###  2 Content Creation
Once you have conceptualized an angle, get your partners to submit effective direct response content that converts. Our content approval tool helps you keep track of the content being used with your .
###  3 Tracking and Reporting
Our tracking provides you dashboards to real-time date around your campaigns. Track up to 12 unique stages of the buyer journey and receive intel that helps you decide what performance or profit enhancements will lift your campaigns.
###  4 Scale Worldwide
Once the campaign is successful in your chosen market, expand your reach to new regions. The partners you find on our platform have years of experience running campaigns in more than 40 different countries. Trust that your growth is in capable hands.
## Why work with Jumbleberry?

# A better model for sports teams  

Powering a new generation of teams going direct-to-consumer that get total control over the fan experience, data, and growth
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6620094ee446b5040f183aed/6866ab80411932e237958f5a_Wolves%20Home%20Tab.png)
## Designed and developed with the help of 70+ teams from the NBA, NHL, NFL, NWSL, WNBA, MLS, MLB, and more.
[Request a Demo](https://www.jump.com/)
Unified Fan Experience Platform
## **The operating system behind the modern fan experience**
Jump unifies ticketing, ecommerce, marketing, fan data, and the team app into one platform built for sports operations. With AI-powered workflows embedded directly into Jump, teams can manage inventory, offers, and fan engagement in one place—moving faster and driving sustainable growth.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6620094ee446b5040f183aed/6996e22f5d4c1185ef00f9ca_core-features_img.jpg)
### **Robust primary and resale ticketing**
### **Fully team-branded apps and digital experiences**
### **Modern commerce tools that drive incremental revenue**
### **Agentic AI that automates manual workflows**
## **The Minnesota Timberwolves are the first direct-to-consumer team in the NBA**
  

# **Proven at scale. Trusted on game day.**
Teams are already running full seasons, high-traffic moments, and increasing revenue with Jump. Our platform is built to scale, backed by modern infrastructure, and proven through fast, successful implementations.
## **The results our clients are seeing**
**+21%**   
YoY attendance   
growth
**50%**   
fewer fan support tickets

# Software that gives you home field advantage  

Everyone knows that it’s better when you’re on your own turf. 
##  Built   
for sports
Legacy ticketing platforms weren’t built for sports. They’re retrofitted from an outdated concert industry model, back when paper tickets were still the norm. These systems lock you out, pile on fees, and limit your control at every turn.
Jump was built for sports. You know your fans, own the experience, and keep the upside.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6620094ee446b5040f183aed/6675e13c782ba450d7b9aec9_Intuit%20Dome.png)
## From our founders:
As team owners ourselves, we understand the challenges of running a modern sports business with outdated tools. We built Jump to fix that.  
  
The legacy tech ecosystem has remained largely unchanged for decades, leaving teams and venues without the modern tools they need to foster deeper connections with fans and explore new opportunities for revenue growth.  
  
That’s why we created Jump: the first vertical software platform for professional sports teams. Our goal is to help teams break free from generic ticketing, fragmented systems and outdated business models. We enable teams to forge direct relationships with fans and unlock their full business potential.  
  
As a sports team, you now have a choice: continue with the status quo of legacy ticketing marketplaces and a constellation of point solutions, or partner with Jump to seamlessly and directly engage with fans and grow your business.  
  
We’re not just building software. We’re building what we wish we had as team owners.  
  
We invite you to explore all the ways Jump can help bring innovation to your team in support of your biggest and most important goals.
Jordy Leiser
Co-Founder & CEO
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6620094ee446b5040f183aed/677ee18f6e2370a4340f5237_Jordy-Photo%2BSignature.png)

Cookie Settings
## We Care About Your Privacy
By clicking “Accept All Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze site usage, and assist in our marketing efforts. [See our cookie policy.](https://jumpcloud.com/privacy)

## Privacy Preference Center
## Privacy Preference Center
  * ### Your Privacy
  * ### Strictly Necessary Cookies
  * ### Performance Cookies
  * ### Functional Cookies
  * ### Targeting Cookies


#### Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.   
[More information](https://cookiepedia.co.uk/giving-consent-to-cookies)
#### Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
#### Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

## Why speed decides who wins
When inbound calls go unanswered, follow-ups happen too late, and teams can’t keep up, leads go cold and revenue slips away.
Inbound calls are missed during peak & after-hours
Outbound teams struggle to connect with prospects
Follow-ups are often delayed and inconsistent
Coverage breaks every time call volume grows
Reps spend more time on manual work than selling
Managers lack visibility into what’s really happening
## Capture, connect, and convert faster with JustCall
Scale lead-to-revenue conversations. Ensure nothing slips through the cracks.
Inbound Teams Outbound Teams Sales Managers Sales & Ops Leaders

## Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.   
[Cookie Notice](https://justcall.io/cookie-notice/)
Allow All
###  Manage Consent Preferences
#### Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
#### Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
#### Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
#### Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

#  Fundamentally changing personal credit for 80% of Brazilians ...and then the rest of the world.
We use people's interactions with their mobile phones to enable them to gain access to fair financial services.  

#  **Using Data to Provide****Financial Opportunities**
Juvo analyzes data from mobile user behavior to build proprietary credit scores. These scores open a new world of financial opportunities for individuals with no formal credit history, which represent 68% of worldwide adults. Starting from services as Airtime Lending for pre-paid cellphone users to Cash Loans using the cellphone as collateral, Juvo provides more than 100,000 loans per day in Brazil.
#    
Juvo in Numbers
# 780M
of Airtime and Cash Loans Disbursed in Brazil in the Last 30 months
# 7.5M
Unique Brazilians Took Airtime and Cash Loans in 2023
# 4M
Cash Loan Requests in 2023
# 10X
Growth in Cash Loans Originated in 2023
# Building Proprietary Credit Scores in partnership with mobile network operators
Over 90% of adults worldwide use mobile phones, generating the data that makes Juvo’s YEScore predictive for credit decisioning.

# Juvo provides the opportunity for billions of people to participate in a new financial world that until now has been closed to them.

## Age Verification
Kairos' age verification technology uses a straightforward approach: it estimates a user's age from just a single selfie. This fast, user-friendly method keeps you compliant with age restrictions without causing potential users to drop off due to lengthy or complex procedures.
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg)](https://www.kairos.com/features/age-verification)

## Stay up to date on AI developments
Our experts weigh in on the latest industry technology.
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67c5e86c84aff0dfa60d4f2d_Digital%20ID.jpg) Special Report: Government-Issued Digital Identity - Implementations in the US, UK, and Europe Digital identity programs are transforming how citizens prove who they are both online and in person. In a recent commentary in The Times, Tony Blair emphasized that embracing technology—including digital identity and face recognition—provides governments with the tools to modernize public services while countering populism and enhancing crime prevention. Governments in the United States, United Kingdom, and across Europe are now rolling out centralized digital identity cards and systems that leverage advanced verification technologies. These systems aim to enhance security, prevent fraud, and streamline access to services while empowering citizens with robust, government-issued credentials. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/government-issued-digital-identity-report-implementations-in-the-us-uk-and-europe)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67c0b610d3a987d7fc13c30d_03d89198-e4f2-44d0-ada5-6a7cf22efd36.png) Face Recognition Bias: From Rashida Tlaib’s Caution to Technical Solutions In a recent open letter, Rep. Rashida Tlaib raised important concerns about the use of facial recognition technology in everyday environments. Tlaib highlighted that if these systems aren’t carefully designed, they can exhibit significant racial bias—misidentifying individuals of color at a much higher rate than white individuals. In her letter, she stressed the need for caution and thorough review, pointing out that studies have shown these systems may not work equally well across all communities. Her message isn’t an attack on any particular retailer; rather, it’s a call for everyone involved—from developers to companies deploying the technology—to ensure that fairness and accuracy are built into these systems from the ground up. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/face-recognition-bias-from-rashida-tlaibs-caution-to-technical-solutions)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67b6f553aec8edcfd868be7e_Main%20photo%20age%20verification.jpg) Kairos: Pioneering Online Safety for Kids in the Age of the Digital Revolution In today’s digital jungle, keeping our kids safe online isn’t just an option—it’s an absolute must. Did you know that a shocking 22% of 8- to 17-year-olds are lying about being over 18 on social media? (BBC News) With the UK Online Safety Act set to be enforced in 2025, it’s clear that the digital world is about to undergo some major changes. And guess what? Kairos is ready to be the game-changer in creating a safer internet for our children. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/kairos-pioneering-online-safety-for-kids-in-the-age-of-the-digital-revolution)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67acb0447e5fab6e3580e81a_FR%20football.jpg) How Facial Recognition is Revolutionizing Super Bowl LIX Security When you think about the Super Bowl, images of incredible athleticism, passionate fans, and unforgettable halftime shows come to mind. But behind the scenes, a high-tech security infrastructure is working overtime to ensure that the event remains safe and secure for everyone. One of the standout technologies making a significant impact is facial recognition. Let’s dive into how facial recognition is being used at Super Bowl LIX, its benefits, and how it fits into a broader ecosystem of AI-driven security measures. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/how-facial-recognition-is-revolutionizing-super-bowl-lix-security)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/65cb63d3d76285ff8805193c_blog%20gen%20ai%20deepfake.webp) Why you don't need to worry about generative AI deepfakes with Kairos Threat actors use generative AI deepfakes to create or manipulate facial images for identity fraud. The process involves either generating new faces or altering existing images tailored to the victim's identity or created to pass as a legitimate user using generative AI. To address the problem specific image capture security protocols and a robust liveness algorithm should be used to effectively block generative AI spoofing attempts. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/why-you-dont-need-to-worry-about-generative-ai-deepfakes-with-kairos)

By adhering to these guidelines, users can significantly enhance the accuracy of identity verification, reducing errors and improving the overall success rate. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/best-practices-for-id-document-and-selfie-submissions)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/65afb3793414fdde3ffccd46_The%20Mechanics%20of%20AI%20in%20Identity%20Verification.png) The Mechanics of AI in Identity Verification As the landscape of digital identity verification rapidly evolves, Artificial Intelligence (AI) is at the forefront, reshaping traditional approaches. This deep dive into AI's role in identity verification is for those familiar with the nuances of data science and computer science. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/the-mechanics-of-ai-in-identity-verification)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/65afb889bce411192f570ef7_Slice%201%20\(7\).png) The Role of Deep Learning in Facial Recognition Technology Deep Learning, particularly Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), has revolutionized facial recognition technology. This layered approach enables the model to discern intricate facial patterns, enhancing recognition accuracy. Backpropagation, a key mechanism in CNNs, refines these features, significantly improving the model's ability to distinguish subtle facial characteristics. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/the-role-of-deep-learning-in-facial-recognition-technology)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/68de32a25d4f23253c5251d6_ChatGPT%20Image%20Oct%202%2C%202025%2C%2010_04_33%20AM.png) National ID Authentication Services (NIDAS): What It Is, How It Works, and Where Kairos Fits For the Philippines, a foundational digital identity is no longer theoretical. The Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA) reports more than 56 million successful authentications through National ID Authentication Services (NIDAS), with the biggest volumes in social protection and financial services. That signals a decisive shift: when users are Filipino nationals, a state-backed identity rail can deliver fast, high-assurance verification at scale. (Philippine Statistics Authority) Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/national-id-authentication-services-nidas-what-it-is-how-it-works-and-where-kairos-fits)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/68d4fa952c0beae0447f879f_Atlanta%20EPP%20Sept%2025.png) Atlanta’s EPP Rollout Shows the Future of Border Control—And Where Kairos Fits In Hartsfield–Jackson Atlanta International Airport just joined a growing list of U.S. ports of entry using Enhanced Passenger Processing (EPP)—CBP’s camera-based, pre-primary screening that confirms identity before a traveler meets an officer. Early results are exactly what airports and airlines want to see: shorter lines, fewer manual checks, and officers reallocated to where they matter most. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/atlantas-epp-rollout-shows-the-future-of-border-control--and-where-kairos-fits-in)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/68c9281049c827b296ffbf22_ChatGPT%20Image%20Sep%2016%2C%202025%2C%2011_04_04%20AM.png) AB 1043 Is Coming: Turn California’s New Age Signal into Safer, Higher-Converting Experiences California’s AB 1043—often called the Digital Age Assurance Act—marks a simple but significant shift: instead of every app guessing a user’s age, operating systems and app stores will send an age-bracket signal to apps. That shifts age assurance from a scattered, app-by-app problem to a shared layer of infrastructure. It’s privacy-preserving (no default ID uploads), it gives developers actual knowledge of a user’s age range, and it creates a clearer path to age-appropriate defaults. What it doesn’t do is finish the job for you. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/ab-1043-is-coming-turn-californias-new-age-signal-into-safer-higher-converting-experiences)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/68b59fbe65f16ad80a0d01e4_ChatGPT%20Image%20Sep%201%2C%202025%2C%2011_56_23%20AM.png) From Blanket ID Checks to Smart Age Assurance: How to Comply with the UK’s Age-Check Rules Without Killing Conversion In just two weeks of the UK’s age-gating taking effect (24 July → 8 August 2025), traffic cratered across the biggest platforms: Pornhub’s daily UK visits fell from 3.6m to 1.9m (-47%), XVideos also dropped 47%, and xHamster slid 39%—all from Similarweb data reported via the BBC; OnlyFans saw an additional ~10% decline in UK traffic over the same period. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/from-blanket-id-checks-to-smart-age-assurance-how-to-comply-with-the-uks-age-check-rules-without-killing-conversion)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/685180f10adcc23db3faaf5f_Britcard%20blog%20photo.png) BritCard: Digital ID’s Next Chapter—Promise or Peril? The BritCard proposal put forward by Labour Together envisions a mandatory, universal digital identity credential—downloaded onto smartphones—that would verify right-to-work and right-to-rent status, streamline access to public services, and help combat illegal migration. As Kairos—a leader in AI-driven identity verification—continually monitors government digital ID initiatives, it’s crucial to examine the diverse perspectives emerging in the wake of the BritCard proposal and explore how it aligns with our mission to deliver secure, user-centric identity solutions. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/britcard-digital-ids-next-chapter--promise-or-peril)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67a3434c6d1279ddcb29182f_liveness%20blog%20photo.webp) Introducing Our New Liveness Model: A Leap Forward in Biometric Security Discover Kairos' latest breakthrough in biometric security with our new liveness model. Designed for passive, selfie-based liveness verification, this enhanced model leverages more data, advanced deep learning backbones, and improved score distributions to deliver greater accuracy and security against spoofing attacks. Experience a seamless and robust authentication process that stays one step ahead of emerging threats. [![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67e5386d17074ee9dc3b1ab1_Digital%20identity%20in%20aviation%20image.png) Adoption of Digital Identity in Airline Transit: A Global Overview Digital identity is transforming international air travel by replacing paper documents with biometrically verifiable digital credentials. This report chronicles the evolution of travel identity from biometric passports (ePassports) introduced in the mid-2000s through emerging digita (IATA One ID biometrics trial cuts airport processing times by 40% | Biometric Update)ntials (DTCs) in the 2020s. It analyzes the key stakeholders—global bodies like ICAO and IATA, national authorities, industry () privacy advocates—and the technologies and standards enabling a seamless passenger journey. Case studies from India, Singapore, the EU, the U (Skip the Surveillance By Opting Out of Face Recognition At Airports | Electronic Frontier Foundation)try initiatives illustrate both the successes and challenges of implementation. International regulations (e.g. ICAO Annex 9 and 17 standards, GDPR in Europe) provide a legal framework, while outcomes are evaluated in terms of security enhancements (e.g. fraud reduction), efficiency gains (faster processing), passenger experience, and inclusivity. The findings show that digital identity systems can sign ()duce queues and identity fraud** (for instance, biometric boarding cut boarding times by up to 9 minutes and U.S. border biometrics have intercepted thousands of imposters). However, concerns around privacy, data security, system reliability, and bias remain pressing. Best practices emerging from early adopters include robust governance partnerships, privacy-by-design (with informed opt-in consent), open standards for interoperability, and maintaining alternative processes for those unable to use digital IDs. Looking ahead to 2030, the report forecasts accelerating global adoption of digital travel identity—potentially leading to a “passportless” travel experience—contingent on addre ()y and equity issues. Recommendations urge stakeholders to collaborate on common standards (like W3C Verifiable Credentials and ICAO DTC), invest in secure infrastructure and public education, enact clear legal protections, and ensure that convenience does not come at the expense of rights. With careful implementation, digital identity can enhance both security and facilitation in air travel, making processes faster and more user-centric while upholding privacy and trust. The BritCard proposal put forward by Labour Together envisions a mandatory, universal digital identity credential—downloaded onto smartphones—that would verify right-to-work and right-to-rent status, streamline access to public services, and help combat illegal migration. As Kairos—a leader in AI-driven identity verification—continually monitors government digital ID initiatives, it’s crucial to examine the diverse perspectives emerging in the wake of the BritCard proposal and explore how it aligns with our mission to deliver secure, user-centric identity solutions. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/britcard-digital-ids-next-chapter--promise-or-peril)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67a3434c6d1279ddcb29182f_liveness%20blog%20photo.webp) Introducing Our New Liveness Model: A Leap Forward in Biometric Security Discover Kairos' latest breakthrough in biometric security with our new liveness model. Designed for passive, selfie-based liveness verification, this enhanced model leverages more data, advanced deep learning backbones, and improved score distributions to deliver greater accuracy and security against spoofing attacks. Experience a seamless and robust authentication process that stays one step ahead of emerging threats.  Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/introducing-our-new-liveness-ensemble-model-a-leap-forward-in-biometric-security)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67e5386d17074ee9dc3b1ab1_Digital%20identity%20in%20aviation%20image.png) Adoption of Digital Identity in Airline Transit: A Global Overview Digital identity is transforming international air travel by replacing paper documents with biometrically verifiable digital credentials. This report chronicles the evolution of travel identity from biometric passports (ePassports) introduced in the mid-2000s through emerging digita (IATA One ID biometrics trial cuts airport processing times by 40% | Biometric Update)ntials (DTCs) in the 2020s. It analyzes the key stakeholders—global bodies like ICAO and IATA, national authorities, industry () privacy advocates—and the technologies and standards enabling a seamless passenger journey. Case studies from India, Singapore, the EU, the U (Skip the Surveillance By Opting Out of Face Recognition At Airports | Electronic Frontier Foundation)try initiatives illustrate both the successes and challenges of implementation. International regulations (e.g. ICAO Annex 9 and 17 standards, GDPR in Europe) provide a legal framework, while outcomes are evaluated in terms of security enhancements (e.g. fraud reduction), efficiency gains (faster processing), passenger experience, and inclusivity. The findings show that digital identity systems can sign ()duce queues and identity fraud** (for instance, biometric boarding cut boarding times by up to 9 minutes and U.S. border biometrics have intercepted thousands of imposters). However, concerns around privacy, data security, system reliability, and bias remain pressing. Best practices emerging from early adopters include robust governance partnerships, privacy-by-design (with informed opt-in consent), open standards for interoperability, and maintaining alternative processes for those unable to use digital IDs. Looking ahead to 2030, the report forecasts accelerating global adoption of digital travel identity—potentially leading to a “passportless” travel experience—contingent on addre ()y and equity issues. Recommendations urge stakeholders to collaborate on common standards (like W3C Verifiable Credentials and ICAO DTC), invest in secure infrastructure and public education, enact clear legal protections, and ensure that convenience does not come at the expense of rights. With careful implementation, digital identity can enhance both security and facilitation in air travel, making processes faster and more user-centric while upholding privacy and trust. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/adoption-of-digital-identity-in-airline-transit-a-global-overview)
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d520/67c5e86c84aff0dfa60d4f2d_Digital%20ID.jpg) Special Report: Government-Issued Digital Identity - Implementations in the US, UK, and Europe Digital identity programs are transforming how citizens prove who they are both online and in person. In a recent commentary in The Times, Tony Blair emphasized that embracing technology—including digital identity and face recognition—provides governments with the tools to modernize public services while countering populism and enhancing crime prevention. Governments in the United States, United Kingdom, and across Europe are now rolling out centralized digital identity cards and systems that leverage advanced verification technologies. These systems aim to enhance security, prevent fraud, and streamline access to services while empowering citizens with robust, government-issued credentials. Read post ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/65aa88196fa61dfde861d513/65ab78536a55cdd038690243_Arrow-Blue.svg) ](https://www.kairos.com/post/government-issued-digital-identity-report-implementations-in-the-us-uk-and-europe)

Do not sell or share my personal information 
As described in our Privacy Policy, we collect personal information from your interactions with us and our website, including through cookies and similar technologies. We may also share this personal information with third parties, including advertising partners. We do this in order to show you ads on other websites that are more relevant to your interests and for other reasons outlined in our privacy policy.
Sharing of personal information for targeted advertising based on your interaction on different websites may be considered “sales”, “sharing”, or “targeted advertising” under certain U.S. state privacy laws. Depending on where you live, you may have the right to opt out of these activities. If you would like to exercise this opt-out right, please follow the instructions below.
If you visit our website with the Global Privacy Control opt-out preference signal enabled, depending on where you are, we will treat this as a request to opt-out of activity that may be considered a “sale” or “sharing” of personal information or other uses that may be considered targeted advertising for the device and browser you used to visit our website.
By clicking “opt out”, the browser on this device will be opted out of sharing personal data.
