# Plan smarter. See clearer. Scale faster. 
Operations tools help you execute. Kaleidoscope helps you plan, predict, and decide. 
By modelling your sales, stock, and (soon) cash flow, we turn every choice into a growth driver — so whatever happens, you’re ready.
## One connected platform, built for eCommerce
Analyse performance, see actuals, forecast, and plan — all in one place, across your key business metrics. That’s smarter planning.
Discover the platform
![spacer](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/1DWKrwH3Mla4GNXPybQiPM/1bc3423e5daa0b5a5a10535e15d82509/line-6.png)
![Demand Forecast UI](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/7C3DFsBk4Mq4tsIM5u03js/a734b238d5ae086de679ede438438b01/Demand-Forecast-UI.png)
## Forecasting shouldn’t feel like a gamble.
Stop reacting — start predicting. Ditch the spreadsheets and forecast using a real-time model of your business.
  * Get accurate demand and stock predictions
  * Plan smarter around trends and promotions
  * Flex and adjust to your business


Discover Demand Planner
![Demand Forecast UI](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/7C3DFsBk4Mq4tsIM5u03js/a734b238d5ae086de679ede438438b01/Demand-Forecast-UI.png)
Discover Demand Planner
![stock UI](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/NjXNefiLmT6rF4vqEkUVB/d976679a39bb2b93eccc4fe0f8966555/Stock-UI.png)
## Stay stocked, sell more, waste less.
Stock outs, messy reorders — getting the balance right is hard. Introducing smarter, more strategic stock planning.
  * Keep your inventory lean and sales high
  * Prevent stockouts, clear slow movers
  * Master it all with flexible days of cover and multi-locations


Discover Stock Planner
![stock UI](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/NjXNefiLmT6rF4vqEkUVB/d976679a39bb2b93eccc4fe0f8966555/Stock-UI.png)
Discover Stock Planner
![Range Planner UI](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/grD3KLluuSCVIvoLr8Dmy/f5f49791e029f0d8a6ccb1adc6c8cf76/Range-Planner-UI.png)
## From SKU chaos to clear profit strategy.
Boost margins and sell more of the right products. Streamline your range, reduce risk, and grow profitability.
  * See exactly what’s selling — and what’s not
  * Know your revenue by channel and product line
  * Track margins and COGs and drive profit


Discover Range Planner
![Range Planner UI](https://images.ctfassets.net/w1g9ncvu3mvg/grD3KLluuSCVIvoLr8Dmy/f5f49791e029f0d8a6ccb1adc6c8cf76/Range-Planner-UI.png)
Discover Range Planner

## When cash flow is stuck, growth stalls.
See exactly what’s coming in, what’s going out, and what you can afford to do next — so you can make smart decisions and sleep easy.
  * Plan inventory spend based on real revenue
  * Avoid cash tie-ups that block growth
  * Forecast capital needs with confidence

## Trusted by worldwide leaders
ABOUT KANSYS 
## Kansys helps growth-driven companies transform operations and scale with confidence
Agility is everything when growth depends on how fast you adapt. Kansys helps businesses accelerate time to market across billing, mediation, and customer management systems to deliver seamless experiences and drive smarter monetization. With modular architecture and metadata-driven design, we give you the freedom to innovate — without limits.
[About Us](https://kansys.com/about-us?hsLang=en)
RESULTS 
## A Track Record You Can Rely On
28+ YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
90+ SUCCESSFUL BILLING CONVERSIONS
$9B+ MANAGED ANNUALLY
4B+ MONTHLY TRANSACTIONS PER CLIENT
PRODUCTS 
## Scale faster with agile BSS, Billing and Mediation solutions  
built for real-world complexity
Our suite of products empowers companies to monetize faster, improve operational efficiency, and gain actionable insights.
Kansys Edge
A Flexible, Modular BSS Solution for Complex Monetization
Kansys Edge is a flexible, industry-agnostic BSS system and billing system designed to manage tailored agreements, dynamic pricing, bundling, discounting, and commitment terms — all through a metadata-driven architecture.
[Learn More](https://kansys.com/bss-solution-kansys-edge/?hsLang=en)
Kansys Mercury
Mediation Solution
Kansys Mercury is a high-performance mediation platform that converts raw usage data into billing-ready records. Designed for speed, accuracy, and scale, it automates validation, enrichment, and data delivery.
[Learn More](https://kansys.com/solution_kansys-mercury?hsLang=en)
Purpose-Built for Flexibility, Across Every Industry
Our suite of products is designed with flexibility in mind — empowering organizations across multiple sectors to simplify complexity, accelerate innovation, and scale efficiently.

6.5b 
#### Blueprint for Brand Growth
The Blueprint for Brand Growth is a breakthrough in understanding how businesses build profitable, strong and sustainable brands.  

[ Find out more  ](https://www.kantar.com/campaigns/blueprint-for-brand-growth)
Access insights from the largest global brand equity study: 4.3 million consumers, 21,000 brands across 54 markets.
4.3m 
#### Kantar BrandZ
Kantar BrandZ brings you industry-leading brand valuation, combined with research from the world’s largest and most extensive brand equity study: 4.3 million consumers covering 21,000 brands across 525 categories in 54 markets. 
[ Read more  ](https://www.kantar.com/campaigns/brandz)
